Name: Espacil
Description: Renouvellement urbain et mixité de population, revitalisation de centre-bourgs, attractivité économique et développement durable, sur l’ensemble de son territoire d’intervention Espacil, filiale du groupe Action Logement, accompagne les collectivités, répond à la diversité et l’évolution des besoins en logements en apportant des solutions adaptées. Espacil Habitat gère 26 000 logements locatifs en Bretagne, Loire-Atlantique et Île-de-France. Acteur majeur de l’accession sociale à la propriété en Bretagne et Loire-Atlantique, Espacil Accession met en oeuvre toutes les solutions permettant au plus grand nombre de devenir propriétaire.

Name: National Retrofit Hub
Description:
The National Retrofit Hub (the Hub) is a nonprofit organisation that brings together all those involved in the retrofit sector to share their expertise and work together to enable a National Retrofit Strategy to be delivered.

The purpose of the Hub is to enable the delivery of housing retrofit at scale in the UK. Retrofitting homes is vital for the UK to achieve its energy security, fuel poverty, and climate change goals.

The National Retrofit Hub has been established to: 
Collaborate: To engage with all retrofit stakeholdersto gather information and identify overlaps and gaps in activity. 
Empower: To provide access to, and share, knowledge to boost industry efforts and enable application of best practices through the sharing of knowledge. 
Facilitate: To enable collective leadership, good governance, and policy engagement. 

This will be delivered through:
Thematic working groups - We have established six working groups focused on identifying the priority actions needed to enable faster delivery of retrofit at scale.
Advisory Panel - Our partners and sponsors are invited to join an independent panel to advise on the delivery of the Hub's activities, ensuring it meets the needs of the sector.
Knowledge Hub/Exchange - Developing a repository of relevant best practice guidance information and knowledge for a wide range of users to help them in the delivery of local retrofit.

Please visit our website for further information and to find out out to get involved.

Name: Domus Social
Description: Domus Social is a company of the Porto City Council whose mission is to promote the City´s housing strategy, manage the public housing stock, grant the maintenance and conservation of all the City Concil´s real estate, equipment and infrastructure, as well as the elaboration, development and implementation of social projects in this area of action.

Name: INOLYA
Description: Inolya est le 1er bailleur social du département. Rattaché au Conseil départemental du Calvados, il accomplit au quotidien sa mission d’intérêt général pour le logement social, au service des territoires et des habitants. L'Office Public de l’Habitat du Calvados gère plus de 26 430 logements sur tout le territoire et loge près de 50 000 personnes, soit environ 7% de la population du Calvados. Notre organisation s'appuie sur des valeurs fortes de proximité, d'innovation et de responsabilité.

Name: Empresa Municipal de la Vivienda y Suelo (Madrid)
Description: EMVS Madrid es una sociedad anónima con capital 100% municipal que desarrolla la política de vivienda del Ayuntamiento de Madrid desde hace más de 40 años.

Name: MHP (Massachusetts Housing Partnership)
Description:
The Massachusetts Housing Partnership (MHP) is a public, non-profit organization that expands access to affordable housing and promotes housing equity in communities across the Commonwealth. Founded in 1985, MHP is now a 70+ employee organization that has delivered $6.5 billion in below-market bank financing for affordable housing and currently has $1.2 billion in assets under management.

Since its founding, MHP has provided financing or technical assistance in nearly every city and town across the Commonwealth. This includes financing for the creation of more than 33,500 affordable rental homes and assistance to over 25,700 low- and moderate-income first-time homebuyers through the groundbreaking ONE Mortgage program.

MHP's Center for Housing Data built award-winning online tools that are helping cities and towns plan for housing growth, envision more inclusive communities, and comply with the MBTA Communities zoning law. MHP is a highly valued thought partner for housing policy and advocacy work at the local, state, and national level.

Every action MHP takes — whether it's a loan, grant, professional assistance, or development of a state or local policy — has the underlying goal of expanding housing opportunities for Massachusetts residents.

Name: Houston Housing Authority
Description:
Our mission is to improve lives by providing quality, affordable housing options and promoting education and economic self-sufficiency.

The Houston Housing Authority provides affordable homes and services to more than 60,000 low-income Houstonians, including over 17,000 families housed through the Housing Choice Voucher Program, 4,200 living in 19 public housing and tax credit developments, and an additional 716 in project-based voucher developments around the city. HHA also administers one of the nation's largest voucher programs exclusively serving homeless veterans. 

The Agency does more than provide safe, affordable homes. We also offer a host of programs to help public housing residents and voucher holders increase their education, live healthier lives, and reach their economic goals. Whether through an HHA-funded activity like the Family Self-Sufficiency Program (FSS) or our affiliate nonprofit Houston Housing Resources Inc., the Agency strives to provide the low-income Houstonians we serve with a full menu of opportunities to help them achieve their goals.

Name: NATIONAL HOUSING CORPORATION
Description:
The National Housing Corporation (NHC) is a statutory body established by an Act of Parliament Cap. 117. 
The primary mandate of NHC is to play a principal role in the implementation of the Government’s Housing Policies and Programmes.

Name: Healthy Homes Hub
Description:
Focused on the social and affordable housing market we are a membership body driving collaboration for healthier living environments, are a knowledge resource helping housing providers deliver healthy homes as well as being a voice and platform to articulate the benefit and value of good health in the home.

We help make things happen through linking the future of health and housing by participating in national research programmes and projects with academic and industry partners.

We help people to do things better by placing health at the centre of the design and operation of every home through our Housing AI smart digital assistant tool, alongside deep research and consultancy services to health and housing providers.

We help articulate the value of good health in the home to share ideas, innovation and learnings across the health and housing sectors.

Through our membership which covers over 65% of the UK’s social housing providers (including the largest housing associations) we want to position health as the most compelling and reliable driver for large scale change in social and affordable housing because we believe you help improve the health of the nation by improving the health of our homes.

Name: Fondation ARALIS
Description: Reconnue d'utilité publique, la Fondation ARALIS propose, depuis 70 ans, aux personnes en difficulté des solutions de logement temporaire et d’accompagnement social, pour se (re)construire et trouver leur place dans la société.

Name: TERRES D'ARMOR HABITAT
Description:
Issu du regroupement de Côtes d’Armor Habitat et de Terre et Baie Habitat, TERRES D’ARMOR

Fort de 16 000 logements locatifs sociaux et de 4 000 logements et places en établissements
spécifiques, implantés sur plus de 250 communes, TERRES D’ARMOR HABITAT va mettre en œuvre une politique de proximité auprès de ses locataires mais aussi des collectivités pour contribuer au développement des territoires.
TERRES D'ARMOR HABITAT c'est aussi une équipe de 250 professionnels qui portent individuellement et collectivement les valeurs du mouvement HLM.

Name: Mawa | مأوى
Description: Mawa for Social Services is a nonprofit real estate development organization specialized in creating and developing sustainable development housing. Its services include building houses to poor people and conducting specialized social research | Licensed by the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development No: 831

Name: EST ENSEMBLE HABITAT
Description:
Le 1er janvier 2023, les Offices HLM des villes de Bagnolet, Bobigny, Bondy et Montreuil, sous la coordination de l'Établissement Public territorial Est Ensemble, se sont regroupés pour créer l’Office public de l'habitat : Est Ensemble Habitat. 
En 2025, Est Ensemble Habitat acquiert le patrimoine de la Sem de Noisy-le-Sec, portant ainsi le nombre de logements sociaux à 28.000, sur 5 communes du territoire de l'EPT.

Name: 2Life Communities
Description: 2Life has been at the heart of positive change in the affordable senior housing ecosystem since 1965, with our residents at the center of everything we do. Our mission is to ensure that all seniors have the opportunity to thrive. To that end, we develop, own, operate, and provide supportive services to every one of our communities. In all we do, we advocate for and empower older adults to age with purpose and joy, meeting the integrated needs of seniors guided by our shared values of lovingkindness, community, and repairing the world. To learn more, please visit 2LifeCommunities.org.

Name: inGemeinschaft
Description:
Wir bringen ältere und jüngere Menschen in einzigartigen Mehrgenerationen-Wohngemeinschaften zusammen: Mehrgenerationen WGs, einfach & sicher 

Stell dir vor, du hast verfügbare Zimmer in deiner Wohnung oder deinem Haus und hättest gerne einen Mitbewohner, bzw. Mitbewohnerin. Nur der Weg dahin, die wirklich passende Person zu finden, all die Administration drumherum schrecken dich ab. Und was ist, wenn etwas nicht passt, etwas kaputt geht und und und. 
-> Hier kommt inGemeinschaft ins Spiel. Wir sind ein Full-Service Anbieter spezialisiert auf Senioren. Wir kümmern uns darum, dass ein wirklich passender Mitbewohner für eine wunderbare WG-Gemeinschaft gefunden wird und haben für (fast) jedes Problem und jede Frage eine Antwort oder finden eine Lösung zusammen.

Name: Finistère Habitat
Description:
Finistère Habitat, bailleur social du Département, loge plus de 17 450 finistériens répartis sur l’ensemble du territoire. 
Avec près de 11 000 logements, Finistère Habitat se positionne comme un acteur majeur du logement social dans le Finistère. 
L'office est reconnu par les locataires pour sa qualité de service (90 % de satisfaction globale – juin 2024), et s’emploie chaque jour à améliorer l’habitat et le cadre de vie des habitants.

Name: Vidle Housing
Description:
Vidle Housing is the first mid-term, fully furnished housing platform created specifically for healthcare travelers.

We exist for the nurses, techs, and allied professionals who move from city to city, shift after shift, caring for others.

Our mission is to make every assignment feel easier, safer, and more like home.

 Mid-term stays
 Fully furnished, move-in ready properties
 Verified listings + trusted hosts
 Built for your lifestyle, your schedule, your care

Finally, housing that fits your assignment life.

Learn more at www.vidlehousing.com

Name: COLOMBES HABITAT PUBLIC
Description: COLOMBES HABITAT PUBLIC is a real estate company based out of 29 AVENUE HENRI BARBUSSE, COLOMBES, France.

Name: Ardèche Habitat
Description:
ARDÈCHE HABITAT est l'Office Public de l'Habitat  rattaché au Conseil Départemental de l'Ardèche. Organisme a but non lucratif, il est depuis près de 70 ans le 1er partenaire des collectivités ardéchoises dans le domaine de l'habitat.

Dans un contexte de précarité économique et d'inflation des prix de l'habitat, ARDÈCHE HABITAT a pour mission de produire une offre de logements de qualité, adaptée à ceux qui ne peuvent se loger au prix du marché.
C'est plus de 6200 logements en location sur le territoire ardéchois.

Enfin, ARDÈCHE HABITAT c'est un engagement fort en faveur du développement durable au travers des constructions répondant aux normes BBC (Bâtiment Basse Consommation), BBC+ ou BEPOS (Bâtiment à Energie POSitive). Au-delà de ces préoccupations énergétiques, l'Office mène une politique volontariste de préservation de l'environnement et d'urbanisme durable.

Name: Raleigh Housing Authority
Description:
Since its inception in 1938, the Raleigh Housing Authority (RHA) has become one of the largest providers of affordable housing in Wake County. Currently, RHA owns and manages nearly 2,000 affordable housing units and administers more than 4,000 Housing Choice (Section 8) Vouchers. The occupancy rate for public housing averages 99% and the voucher program is 100% utilized, as of March 2025. There is a waiting list for both programs.

RHA has a nine-member Board of Commissioners that provides oversight for the Authority. Under HUD’s report card called the Public Housing Assessment System, RHA has been consistently rated as a “High Performer.”

The mission of the Raleigh Housing Authority is to provide safe, quality, affordable housing to low and moderate income families in the greater Raleigh community, and to promote personal responsibility and self-sufficiency of residents while maintaining the fiscal integrity of the agency.

Name: Mixall Group srl
Description: Mixall Group is a window manufacturing and window frames company based out in Pradamano, UD, Italy.

Name: Housing Assistance
Description: Housing Assistance Corporation delivers housing services and programs that ensures all on Cape Cod and the Islands have access to safe, secure, decent housing. We are inspired by the children that we serve and work to build a strong, healthy and diverse community that they will one day inherit. We are guided by a deep respect for our clients, colleagues and the planet we share.

Name: Housing Collaborative
Description: We make affordable housing easier to navigate.

Name: Housing First Auckland
Description: We are a collective of five non-government organisations: Housing First providers Auckland City Mission Te Tāpui Atawhai, Lifewise, LinkPeople and Visionwest Waka Whakakitenga with backbone support provided by the Wise Group. By adopting the model of Collective Impact to inform a multi-agency approach, we work to provide permanent housing with ongoing and sustained wraparound support services to whānau across Tāmaki Makaurau. We are committed to a shared vision that everyone should have a place to call 'home'. Working together strengthens our ability to walk alongside whānau to sustain their tenancies and whakapuāwai (flourish).

Name: Companhia Metropolitana de Habitação de São Paulo (Cohab-SP)

Name: HAPI'Coop
Description: HAPI'Coop est une coopérative non lucrative et non spéculative qui portent des projets d'Habitats Inclusifs. Nous proposons aux futurs habitants des logements abordables, un accompagnement vers et dans le logement et une animation du collectif d'habitants.

Name: The GEM Programme
Description:
The housing sector is home to dedicated and passionate people who believe that good housing really makes a difference to people’s lives. With well-established links with the Chartered institute of Housing, International Housing Partnership and Government departments, we offer a wide range of jobs and intensive learning experiences in the housing sector across the country and even internationally!

Unlike other programmes we match people to roles which will suit their passion, skills and experience. We also offer opportunities for those already working in the sector to develop their talents and career prospects as well as offering a “graduate or equivalent” route called Talent in House.

We offer work opportunities that provide responsibility, variety and challenge, right from the start. GEMs have the chance to gain a CIH level 4 qualifications, work in a role with real value, take part in our unique GEMshack workshops and shape the future of Housing!

Since the GEM Programme started in November 2009 we have recruited and developed nearly 200 graduates from diverse backgrounds, degree subjects and universities onto the GEM Programme and into housing sector roles
105 GEMs have completed their CIH qualification since we became accredited in 2012
partnered with over 55 housing sector organisations and construction companies, nationally and internationally

Twitter: @GEM_Housing
Instagram: @thegemprogramme
Website: TheGEMprogramme.com

Name: Loket Housing
Description: Loket Housing is het centrale toegangsloket in Zuid-Limburg voor mensen vanaf 18 jaar met een huisvestingsvraag in combinatie met een begeleidingsvraag. Het loket bemiddelt naar een passende (huur)woning of bemiddelt bij ernstige woonoverlast om uithuiszetting te voorkomen. Het gaat daarbij altijd om mensen die een niet-standaard woonvraag hebben en dus niet via de reguliere weg door de woningcorporatie geholpen kunnen worden.

Description:
Ensemble2generations Région Sud 
Promeut la cohabitation intergénérationnelle sur le territoire du sud avec plusieurs agences sur le terrain à :

Name: Hope and Life Outreach
Description:
Since 2007, HALO Ministry has been a beacon of hope for the homeless and hungry in our community. We are committed to providing essential services, including nourishing meals, warm clothing, safe shelter, and comprehensive recovery programs tailored for men, women, and mothers with children.

At HALO, we believe in restoring dignity and offering a fresh start. Whether you need a warm place to sleep, a hot meal to sustain you, counseling to guide you, or a prayer to uplift you, HALO is here to help. Our compassionate approach ensures that every individual who walks through our doors feels valued and supported on their journey to a better future.

Our Mission is simple but life changing;
“Love ‘Em Like Jesus”

Jesus loved us unconditionally. No matter the reason a person finds themselves homeless, they are loved.

Our Core Values
- We Honor God by trusting and obeying Him. 
- We are good stewards of God’s Resources. 
- We value people.

Name: Vivacité
Description:
Alotra est une association régie par la loi du 1er juillet 1901. Créée en 1954, Alotra intervient principalement en région Sud PACA. Son métier est la gestion locative sociale.

Initialement, ALOTRA gérait essentiellement des Foyers de Travailleurs Migrants en réalisant exclusivement des travaux de sécurité et de maintenance sans réhabilitation des structures pour conforter l’habitat. Cette situation a entraîné peu d’investissements, peu de financements, tout en générant à chaque bilan, des résultats d’exploitation positifs. En 1996, ALOTRA s’implique dans le Plan Quinquennal de traitement des Foyers de Travailleurs Migrants, permettant la réhabilitation de ses structures et leur mutation en résidences sociales. En 2004, ALOTRA a réhabilité l’ensemble de son patrimoine.

Ayant vocation à intervenir sur les différents maillons de la chaîne de l’habitat, ALOTRA a diversifié ses produits et sa clientèle. 

Aujourd'hui, ALOTRA gère :
- des résidences sociales à destination de ménages défavorisés et de travailleurs immigrés, 
- une résidence pour étudiants, 
- une résidence pour des fonctionnaires d’Etat, 
- des logements P.L..A.I. en diffus,
- un centre d’accueil pour demandeurs d’asile (CADA),
- des Aires d’Accueil pour les gens du voyage
- deux centres sociaux à destination des gens du voyage.
- un service d'Ingénierie Sociale et Urbaine

Plus de 5500 personnes sont ainsi accueillies au sein du parc géré par Alotra. L’association assure aussi l’accueil d’un public diversifié (jeunes, familles, hommes, femmes, personnes âgées, étrangers, gens du voyage…) rencontrant majoritairement des difficultés économiques et sociales.

Name: Deposit Unlock
Description:
Deposit Unlock is an innovative industry mortgage guarantee scheme designed to help borrowers secure a new-build home with a deposit of just 5%. 



 Currently with high-street lender Accord Mortgages, long-term fixed rate lender Perenna and specialist lender Bluestone Mortgages!



 Until October 2022 the government’s Help to Buy scheme had been the driving force behind high loan-to-value (LTV) new-build lending. 



 As the scheme drew to a close, a group of 17 property developers – part of the trade body, Home Builders Federation (HBF)  – recognised the need for a private sector mortgage guarantee scheme as an alternative.



 On behalf of these builders, the HBF & HFS commissioned Gallagher Re – the reinsurance division of Gallagher – to design, initiate and implement such a scheme.



 The solution proposed by Gallagher Re utilises a protected cell captive to provides mortgage insurance to lenders allowing them to lend on new-build housing, at a 95% loan-to-value ratio, with reduced risk exposure.


Deposit Unlock launched in June 2021 and Gallagher Re administers the scheme on behalf of the members.

Name: Wajh Shamal Real Estate
Description:
Wajh Shamal Real Estate specializes in providing high quality housing solutions across Saudi Arabia with a strong presence in major project areas such as NEOM AMAALA and the Red Sea. With extensive experience in delivering fully furnished and fully serviced residential units we support the needs of companies operating within national strategic developments. To date we have successfully completed more than 150 housing contracts in these regions.

Our operations focus on developing and managing large scale ready to use accommodations that meet a wide range of operational requirements. Our clients include local contractors as well as international firms. Alongside the housing itself we oversee essential support services including maintenance cleaning security and full facility management to ensure comfort reliability and long term operational efficiency.

We are proud to contribute to the goals of Saudi Vision 2030 by offering smart sustainable and client centered housing solutions. At Wajh Shamal we go beyond accommodation to deliver a complete hospitality experience.

Email: info@wajhre.com

Name: CEHAB - Companhia Estadual de Habitação e Obras

Description:

Our team helps cities to navigate the challenges and barriers they face today to build low-rise infill housing, while at the same time creating vibrant, complete communities. We have been selected by the Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation (CMHC) as a semi-finalist in the Housing Supply Challenge - Round 5

Name: HLM IRP
Description:
HLM IRP est une entreprise sociale pour l'habitat francilienne, membre du groupe Habitat Réuni.
Ses équipes, composées de 140 collaborateurs, œuvrent au quotidien pour l’intérêt collectif et la mission prioritaire qui leur incombe : loger. 
Solidarité, qualité de service, responsabilité, utilité sociale, sont autant de valeurs essentielles à l’accomplissement de cette mission.
Le collectif que forme les collaborateurs d’IRP, c’est une grande variété de métiers alliant diversité de savoir-faire qui permettent à la société de disposer d’un large champ d’intervention : construire, acquérir,
réhabiliter, commercialiser, gérer, accompagner…
Cette page a pour objectif de vous partager le quotidien de ce collectif : toute une équIRP !

Name: Oxford House Inc.
Description: Peer-run, Self-sustaining, Substance-free Housing

Name: SHARE! The Self-Help And Recovery Exchange
Description:
Since 1993, SHARE! the Self-Help And Recovery Exchange has served people through self-help support groups and communities that provide recovery and social support. 

SHARE! is dedicated to providing housing, rehabilitation, and renewal, guiding individuals toward lives filled with purpose and hope. We are a catalyst for transformation, shaping futures that reflect the very essence of who you are and aspire to be, where transformation happens.

Mission Statement:

SHARE! provides a nurturing environment where individuals can honor their life stories, pursue personal growth, and embrace change by choice. Through lived experience peer support, self-help support groups and collaborative housing, we empower individuals to reinvigorate their foundational life skills and address unresolved traumas. We foster personal accountability and provide unwavering support as individuals embark on a purpose-driven journey towards life transformation. Our outcomes are who you become.

As people develop skills to cope with substance use, trauma, mental health disorders, and dysfunctional relationships, people learn to better their own lives, get jobs, reconnect with family and friends and reintegrate into the community. 

SHARE!’s programs–SHARE! Collaborative Housing, SHARE! self-help centers in Culver City and Downtown, the SHARE! Recovery Retreat and SHARE! Volunteer-to-Job internships–are designed to support self-sufficiency through social support and community integration. 

The idea for SHARE! grew out of the frustrations people attending self-help support groups faced, repeatedly encountering operational problems that interfered with the healing process. Under the auspices of Emotional Health Association, a California 501(c)(3) corporation, a group of meeting-goers formed a board and working committees. SHARE! officially opened its doors at an abandoned warehouse in Venice, CA in 1993. 

Want More Information?
Visit www.shareselfhelp.org or contact us at info@shareselfhelp.org.

Name: Happipad
Description:
Happipad creates affordable housing by unlocking hidden housing supply through spare bedrooms across the country. 

Our mission is to help make this under-utilized real estate available for those who need a safe, affordable, and welcoming place to call home, whether for a few months or several years.

As a result, Happipad helps residents integrate into established neighbourhoods to promote inclusivity and foster diversity. Renters are able to feel like locals and start building new connections and friendships from the day they arrive.

Name: Rooted Life
Description:
Rooted Life is a compassionate and innovative organization operating in California, dedicated to aiding those experiencing homelessness, recovering from hospital stays, or facing housing challenges. Our mission is to guide individuals through the journey of finding and securing safe, stable homes. We provide essential services including financial assistance for initial housing costs and ongoing support to maintain stable living situations. Additionally, we offer temporary residential care for those with medical or behavioral health needs but without stable housing. Employing a scattered site housing model, Rooted Life ensures each residence is fully furnished, creating environments conducive to healing and recovery. Our commitment to these causes has established us as a beacon of hope and support in the community.
Rooted Life focuses on progression, foundation and connection. We do our very best to meet people where they are, and encourage them to develop their skills and abilities, so they may live the best life possible.  By providing individualized attention and compassion as an essential aspect of our home, we can better assist those living with psychiatric vulnerabilities and addictions. Our teams provide an environment where men and women can move from surviving to thriving.

Description: Le SIAO (Service Intégré d’Accueil et d’Orientation) est une plateforme départementale de coordination et de régulation du secteur AHIL (Accueil / Hébergement / Insertion / Logement).

Name: Office d'habitation de l'Outaouais
Description:
À la suite de la création de la Société d’habitation du Québec, les offices municipaux d’habitation ont vu le jour au Québec, en 1969. C’est le 15 octobre 1969 qu’a été créé l’Office municipal d’habitation de Hull, le premier en Outaouais. Gatineau et plusieurs autres villes ont fondé leur office dans les années suivantes. En 2018, plusieurs OMH de la région se sont regroupés pour créer l’Office d’habitation de l’Outaouais. Son mandat est de gérer et d'administrer des logements et des programmes d'habitation, ainsi que d’offrir un milieu de vie de qualité à ses locataires.

LA MISSION
Offrir un logement social de qualité en contribuant activement au mieux-être des individus, en procurant un milieu de vie favorisant le développement des personnes et des communautés.

LA VISION
Être un bâtisseur exemplaire de communautés durables par notre leadership, notre rayonnement, notre culture d’amélioration continue, l’engagement de l’équipe et la fierté des locataires.

LES VALEURS
1. CHEF DE FILE - Être reconnu par ses pairs grâce aux pratiques innovatrices et exercer une influence positive dans son domaine.
2. QUALITÉ DES SERVICES - Offrir des services de qualité adaptés aux besoins de sa clientèle avec respect, rigueur et intégrité.
3. PARTENARIAT - Miser sur la force de partenariat en se concertant avec les partenaires du milieu et le Comité consultatif des résidents.
4. AMÉLIORATION CONTINUE - Identifier, analyser et gérer les occasions d'amélioration de la performance et contribuer efficacement au processus d'optimisation en appliquant les pratiques reconnues du Lean Six Sigma.
5. INNOVATION - Mettre en œuvre des pratiques favorisant l’esprit créatif et encourager des initiatives et idées innovantes.
6. PLAISIR - Travailler positivement, avec enthousiasme, engagement et fierté dans la réalisation des objectifs communs.

SHA is committed to enriching lives of our community members by providing quality, well managed, affordable housing opportunities and client services to promote independence.

Our vision is for Saskatoon citizens to have homes that promote health, independence, security and dignity, and enhance the social and economic well-being of neighborhoods.

Nos maisons partagées permettent à plusieurs seniors de cohabiter au sein d’un même lieu, la vie s’y organise selon le libre choix de chacun, dans le respect d’autrui et avec un accompagnement personnalisé : un(e) coordinateur(trice) présent(e) au quotidien. 
Les individus y sont acteurs, contribuant à leur bien-être tant physique que psychologique.

Ce type de logement est une véritable alternative à l'EHPAD et aux autres institutions médico-sociales conventionnelles. Chez ADISVIE, la notion de « chez soi » est essentielle. Nous développons une offre dans un milieu rural, dans des lieux de vie adaptés et sécurisés. Nous offrons ainsi des conditions de vieillissement saines, donnant aux séniors colocataires la confiance nécessaire pour mieux prendre part à la vie en société.

Name: RentSaveOwn with Own Homes
Description:
As a socially responsible landlord, rent can be part of the solution. At Own Homes, we give homebuyers a way to #RentSaveOwn.

If you're ready to own your home but are struggling to save the deposit, you’re not alone, and you’re not out of options.

Here’s how we help:
 You choose a new-build home from one of our partner housebuilders
 We buy it for you
 You move in and rent it
 A portion of your rent goes into a secure savings account towards your deposit
 Within five years, you’ll have enough deposit to switch to a mortgage to buy.

You live in the home you want now, and build your deposit over time.

Our model makes the journey to buying a home more achievable, especially for those who are financially ready but just missing that all-important deposit.

We work with partner housebuilders, financial providers, and the government to make RentSaveOwn possible.

We believe in turning renting into progress.
We believe in giving people the tools to move forward.
We believe in homeownership that’s more accessible, more flexible, and built around your goals.

 If you believe rent should lead to your own front door, you're in the right place.

Name: OHRA
Description:
OHRA helps low-income people build better lives through access to social service resources. By helping people move from crisis to stability, OHRA builds more capable individuals, stronger families, and a better community. We achieve this mission through three core programs:
OHRA Community Resource Center (OCRC) is the only walk-in resource center serving Jackson County, offering these basic services: 
•	Housing Match helps unhoused people find housing and resources to become stable and housing threatened people to stay housed by providing short-term rent or utilities assistance and other resources. 
•	Job Match gives job search assistance to help people find employment. 
•	Essential Services are resources that enable guests to overcome barriers to moving forward, including but not limited to assistance to purchase critical items such as a birth certificate or Oregon ID; help applying for benefits and navigating systems including e.g. OHP or Social Security; and, access to internet, telephone and U.S. mail.  

The OHRA Emergency Shelter (OES) is a year-round, non-congregate facility providing emergency housing and meals to vulnerable unhoused people for up to 6-months. During their stay, guests have access to support navigation services where trauma-informed staff work alongside guests to help them develop a housing plan, gain employment, or access services to support long-term health and well-being.

The OHRA Laundry and Shower Trailer (OLST) where unhoused people can access basic hygiene services. 

OHRA’s staff of Resource Navigators are the heart of every program offered at the Center, placing the guest at the center of our service, and working alongside them with a trauma-informed approach. By building relationships rooted in trust, OHRA Resource Navigators help identify and meet the most pressing needs of guests. Our goal is to be a “one-stop shop” where a guest can find everything they need to move from crisis to stability.

Développé avec la conviction que la digitalisation des processus n'est pas qu'une surprenante formule et que le numérique peut radicalement améliorer le suivi, le pilotage et la performance-relocation, BECKREL permet de :

Name: Santoro Costruzioni S.r.l.
Beaufort Housing Authority
Description:
Established in 1966 with a vision to enhance the quality of life for our residents, the Housing Authority of the Town of Beaufort strives to create thriving neighborhoods where all members feel valued and empowered.  We understand the profound impact that stable housing can have on individuals and communities, and we are dedicated to fostering environments that promote dignity, respect, and opportunity for all.

Our team consists of passionate professionals who are dedicated to serving our residents with integrity, compassion, and innovation.  We believe in collaborative partnerships with local agencies, stakeholders, and community members to ensure that our programs and services meet the evolving needs of Beaufort's diverse population.

By providing affordable rental units and supportive services, we are committed to fostering housing stability and promoting self-sufficiency among our residents.  Through initiatives focused on education, employment, and wellness, we aim to empower individuals and families to achieve their full potential and build brighter futures.

As stewards of public trust, we uphold the highest standards of transparency, accountability, and efficiency in our operations.  We are committed to fostering an inclusive and welcoming environment where everyone has access to safe, decent, and affordable housing options, regardless of background or circumstance.

As the Housing Authority of the Town of Beaufort, we believe that everyone deserves a place to call home.  We invite you to learn more about our program, services, and initiatives and join us in our mission to build stronger, more vibrant communities in Beaufort, NC.

Together, we can make a lasting difference in the lives of those we serve.

Description:
Association d'intérêt général, experte en cohabitation intergénérationnelle depuis 2006. 
ensemble2générations met en relation jeunes (18-30 ans) et seniors pour cohabiter sous un même toit dans un esprit d'entraide et de solidarité encadré par un contrat (loi ELAN)
ensemble2générations répond à plusieurs enjeux sociétaux:
- aider les jeunes à se loger
- lutter contre l'isolement et la solitude des aînés
- aider au maintien à domicile
- favoriser la mixité sociale
- lutter contre la fracture numérique des seniors
- apporter du répit aux aidants
- mutualiser les surfaces et équipements, diminuer la consommation d'énergie 
La cohabitation intergénérationnelle à un impact positif sur la santé des seniors, en compagnie d'un jeune, ils se sentent valorisés. L'intéraction sociale est un excellent stimulant cognitif. Cuisiner ensemble et partager des repas permet de garder une bonne alimentation 
 Côté jeunes, ils peuvent accéder à un logement économique et se sentent utiles auprès d'un senior. Ils peuvent se consacrer à leurs études sans avoir besoin d'un job étudiant. La transmission de l'expérience, des savoirs des aînés vers les plus jeunes est bénéfique pour se construire.
 Les famillles sont rassurées de savoir leurs parents bien entourés avec une présence régulière le soir et la nuit
Le logement intergénérationnel c'est % gagnant!

Description: BeyondHome (Colorado Homeless Families, Inc dba BeyondHome) was established as a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization in 1987 with a mission to provide housing and opportunities for working families experiencing homelessness. BeyondHome’s mission is to assist working families in their quest to go from homelessness to self-sufficiency for life. BeyondHome is a faith-based organization.

Name: The Union Mission
Description:
The Union Mission was founded in 1987 by a single individual who, in conjunction with the Latrobe Ministerial Association, saw the need for a short-term residential facility for disadvantaged men.  The Mission would be a place where housing and support could be offered for those experiencing economic and/or personal crises in their life.



Men did not just "stay" at the Mission.  They were oriented into the community with a broader purpose and given opportunities for ongoing counseling, fellowship, group activities and much more.  It remains a place where both our guests and our neighbors see past the erroneous stigmas attached to homelessness and invite one another to a more accurate understanding of the dignity of the human person.



Recognizing the changing landscape around housing insecurity and the barriers our clients were facing, the Union Mission has evolved into providing a variety of interventions and support mechanisms toward ensuring that homelessness is rare, brief, and non-recurring in Westmoreland County.

Name: EcoFunding4U

So, if you have a non-condensing boiler and on benefits you could be eligible for a FREE new boiler, air source heat pump, solar panels, loft insulation and cavity wall insulation!

Name: Regional Housing Victoria
Description:
Virtually every community across rural and regional Victoria is scrambling to address a shortage of housing that is affordable, liveable and secure. 
In many areas, rents have increased by over 50% in five years…. If you can find somewhere to rent. 
Costs of buying or building homes have increased.
People living in homelessness are being offered tents for a family and a swag if you are single. 
Jobs are not being filled because new people looking to move to town can’t find a home. 
This is a national problem, but we feel that the solutions are much harder to find in rural and regional communities where housing has historically been available and affordable. 
But you know all this already. 

Regional Housing Victoria is a purpose driven consultancy with tools and resources to assist communities to identify local challenges and opportunities and then take action. 
Addressing the shortfall in safe, secure and affordable housing is a complex, slow and frustrating journey – a marathon, not a sprint. 
Steve Dunn and Roger Hastrich, Directors of Regional Housing Victoria, have a wealth of experience in state and local government along with the community sector and a deep understanding of the complex housing eco-system. 
We work on social and key worker housing; land supply & forging partnerships. 
We have tools relating to data / planning / co-ordination and community engagement.
Let's chat: 
Steve Dunn 
   Mobile: 0417382740 Email: steve@rhvic.com.au
Roger Hastrich  
   Mobile: 0419583561 Email: roger@rhvic.com.au

Name: Triphammer Cooperative
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn page for Triphammer Cooperative – the edgyest, veggiest, iciest certified yutes on the corner of Triphammer and Jessup Road... 

Built in 1912, the big blue house originally housed a Sigma Kappa chapter. In 1956, the all-white sorority offered membership to Barbara Collier Delany––an African American. National headquarters gave them an ultimatum: reject the new pledge, or get shut down. Members of the local chapter refused to kick out Delaney, and the sorority was continued to as an independent sorority. In 1964, the house transformed into a student-run, women's cooperative. Triphammer Cooperative eventually became co-ed in the late 1990's. Today, it is home to 20 undergraduate and graduate students.

Description: Strategisch advies op het gebied van onderwijshuisvesting, programmamanagement, begeleiden van bestuurlijke besluitvorming, vertaling van beleid naar vastgoedportefeuille, inrichten van huisvestingsprogrammas en het vertalen van onderwijskundige visie naar Programma van Eisen

Name: HOGAR Inc. Housing options and Geriatric Association Resources Inc.
Description: Housing Options and Geriatric Association Resources, Inc. (H.O.G.A.R.) was incorporated in March 1996 to assist society’s most disenfranchised; the elderly, seriously mentally ill adults, the homeless, adults living with Special Needs and the physically challenged by promoting, fostering and providing the highest quality of housing and services in a most therapeutic, rehabilitative and aesthetically satisfying environment. H.O.G.A.R.’s approach to housing and services is based on the philosophy, goals and objectives of psychosocial rehabilitation. The organizations’ goal is to restore an individual’s ability for independent living, socialization and effective life management. H.O.G.A.R.’s services and housing builds on personal strengths to offset the effects of the aging process, illness and history of the homelessness and in coordination with other treatment and rehabilitation services.

Name: ABLE Inc.
Description: ABLE Inc. has served people with developmental disabilities in Southeast Minnesota for 45 years. Our services honor uniqueness and promote dignity, independence and self-esteem. Today we have 10 community and one intermediate care facility that serve over 50 people.

Name: ROYAL T PREMIER
Description: Royal T Premier is a Transitional Housing Program that provides housing, resources, and supportive services for homeless veterans, women, and their families. Some of which may be former inmates/convicts, allowing them to ultimately obtain permanent housing and become self-sufficient. The organization provides housing assistance to help stabilize the individual's reentry process and enhance their ability to remain sober, employed, and crime-free.

Name: FSU Exploration & Discovery Living-Learning Community
Description: The Exploration and Discovery Learning Community (ED-LLC) at Florida State University is designed to support first-year students as they adjust to university life. Originally established in 1997 as the Bryan Hall Learning Community, it is FSU’s longest-running Learning Community, offering an intimate, supportive environment within the larger university.

Name: Connections Services
Description:
Connections Services is dedicated to the long-term needs of the individuals we support throughout all stages of their lives.
We focus on strengthening individual independence, establishing the foundation of acceptance,
and building appropriate community supports throughout those life stages.

Description: HavenSafe is dedicated to preventing homelessness through helping people become more financially stable with rental assistance funding and education on financial responsibility.

Name: Disca Srl
Description:
Disca srl nasce nel Giugno del 2000 dalla volontà del Sig. Giorgio Disca il quale ha donato la sua trentennale esperienza allo sviluppo e alla crescita dell'attività. Una particolare sinergia legava Giorgio ai suoi soci, ai suoi clienti e fornitori, ai suoi dipendenti.
Purtroppo ha lasciato troppo presto, prematuramente, questa realtà che tanto amava.
A raccogliere l'eredità (e la sfida) è stato lo storico socio, Sig. Gerardo Davide Ferracane, oggi unico proprietario, occupato a 360° nella gestione tecnica/produttiva e di direzione dei cantieri.
Nel 2002 abbiamo raggiunto il nostro più ambito obbiettivo: trasformare l’azienda in una realtà produttiva. Oggi di fatto siamo una realtà ben strutturata, integrata e supportata dal nostro ufficio tecnico/commerciale in grado di acquisire, sviluppare e gestire tutte le nostre commesse. Progettiamo, produciamo e posiamo in opera le più svariate serie di manufatti, per ogni tipologia di mercato quali abitazioni private, uffici, fabbricati industriali, commerciali, alberghi, negozi, etc…,  sia per il mercato nazionale che Estero.
Disponiamo di una vasta gamma di prodotti quali serramenti in alluminio, alluminio/legno e pvc,  facciate continue strutturali e ventilate, oltre a prodotti complementari quali persiane, tapparelle, frangisole e schermature di vario tipo e da altri prodotti affini, offrendo un ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Per soddisfare la flessibilità richiesta da questo tipo di mercato ci avvaliamo, oltre che della nostra struttura composta da 18 dipendenti suddivisi tra ufficio tecnico e produzione, della collaborazione di aziende Leader nel nostro settore che ci permettono di acquisire anche commesse molto importanti. Per la progettazione il nostro ufficio tecnico si avvale dei più moderni strumenti tecnologici, quali software AUTOCAD, il software FPPRO della Emmegisoft per la progettazione ed il calcolo degli infissi. Ci avvaliamo altresì della collaborazione di prestigiosi studi di professionisti abilitati qu

Name: Kuratorium Qualitätssiegel Betreutes Wohnen NRW e.V.
Description:
Das Qualitätssiegel wird vergeben vom Kuratorium „Qualitätssiegel Betreutes Wohnen für ältere Menschen Nordrhein-Westfalen e. V.“. Hier arbeiten verschiedene Akteure zusammen, die sich im Feld des Betreuten Wohnens bzw. Service-Wohnens engagieren.

Hierzu zählen verschiedene Verbände aus dem Verbraucherschutz, der Wohnungswirtschaft, der ambulanten Pflege und der Forschung. Der Vorstand des Kuratoriums gliedert sich entsprechend in Vertreter der Anbieterseite, der Umsetzerseite sowie natürlich auch der Nutzerseite.

Name: Chichester Greyfriars Housing Association Ltd.
Description:
Chichester Greyfriars’ Housing Association's history started in 1969. It was established by local people with the support of the Council. Its aim was to provide affordable housing for local people of retirement age.

The first scheme developed by the Association was St Pancras in 1974. It provided 12 flats and was named Arthur Ingram Court after one of the Association’s founding members. A further, larger development of seventy-one flats was built on a site between Bognor Road and York Road. It was opened in 1977 by Her Royal Highness Princess Alexandra hence the name Royal Close.

No further development took place for nearly 50 years until 2017 when a further 4 flats were secured at Pynham Crescent in Hambrook.

A Board of Directors (who are not paid) set the strategic direction of the Association and there is a staff team who manage the day to day running of the organisation.

Name: Innova Smart Prefabricated House - Smart Property
Description:
Innova Smart Living Where Smart Capsule Homes Redefine Modern Living. Our innovative designs combine the latest in technology and sustainability to create efficient, comfortable, and eco-friendly living spaces. Experience The Future Of Housing With Alloyed Innovation In Innova Living
Our Luxury Capsule house are meticulously designed with a strong emphasis on environmental sustainability. These compact living spaces are crafted with eco-friendly materials and equipped with advanced technology to minimize energy consumption and carbon footprint.

Name: Trinity Divine Living
Description: Welcome to Trinity Divine Living, group homes dedicated to providing a warm, nurturing, and supportive environment for adults with diverse abilities. Our goal is to help our residents achieve their full potential, maximize their independence, and live a fulfilling life. At Trinity Divine Living, we offer personalized care, 24/7 supervision, and a range of programs and activities designed to enhance our residents' physical, emotional, and social well-being. Follow us to learn more about our mission, services, and success stories.

Name: Our Place NH
Description: Our Place is a nonprofit organization with a mission to provide supportive housing for adults with intellectual developmental disabilities (IDD) in the New Hampshire seacoast.  In August of 2024 we purchased a former daycare center in Dover, NH and plan to turn it into apartments for 11 adults with IDD.   Each tenant will have their own apartment and be fully included in the community with jobs, social activities and recreation opportunities. We are using the model of Visions for Creative Housing Solutions  (Visionsnh.org).

Name: Washington Manufactured Housing Association
Description:
Are you seeking the American dream of homeownership in the Pacific Northwest? Whether you’re brand new to the housing market or simply looking to expand your portfolio, you can find a quality-built home through manufactured housing! The members of the Washington Manufactured Housing Association have a variety of home offerings to meet entry level, mid-priced, and even higher-end housing solutions. Members construct each manufactured home or modular home with the craftsmanship and attention to detail that your dream home deserves. With manufactured homes built to strict standards in a quality-controlled factory environment, your new home can be installed quicker and easier than site-built construction. Increasingly, the need for quality constructed, efficient, and affordable is being met by manufactured homes. 
Furthermore, factory-built homes offer customizable floor plans. Factory-built manufactured and modular homes are constructed with benefits traditional housing simply can’t provide. The NHA’s resources can illuminate how these quality-built, environmentally-sound modular homes are changing the future of affordable housing in the Pacific Northwest; and browsing the NHA membership directory can help one find a home that fits an ideal lifestyle and budget. Visit todaysmanufacturedhomes.com for more details.

Name: Presentation Partners in Housing
Description: Presentation Partners in Housing imagines a just and equitable Fargo-Moorhead community where: the most vulnerable among us are treated with dignity and respect, and have a stable home, so each person can attend to their body, mind, and spirit and pursue a life of meaning and purpose.

Name: Indian River Habitat for Humanity
Description: Since 1991, Indian River Habitat has served the community by providing affordable homeownership, home repair and home preservation for qualifying families. Annually, we serve approximately 100 families through its new construction and home repairs programs.

Name: Premier Compliance Consulting
Description:
Premier Compliance Consulting was established in 2018 with a mission to streamline compliance processes for our clients. We provide expert guidance and tailored services to meet specific affordable housing requirements, effectively minimizing the risk of noncompliance.  

Our mission is to empower families and individuals in need of affordable housing by relieving owners and managers of compliance-related stress. We are committed to enabling property owners and managers to concentrate on what truly matters – the well-being and satisfaction of their residents. 

Our services begin with training the client team members, then covering the entire spectrum, starting from the initial phase of the affordability period and continuing throughout the program's lifecycle. We handle all aspects related to the housing program's requirements, even when dealing with multiple layers of different programs.

Premier upholds a high standard of excellence; therefore, we rigorously screen our team members for their expertise and extensive knowledge before bringing them on board. We continue enhancing our skills and expertise by actively participating in industry training seminars, compliance conferences, and professional discussion groups.

At our core, we uphold the principles of integrity, delivering top-notch services to our clients while adhering to the highest standards of professionalism and ethics. Our foundation is built on the belief in cultivating enduring relationships with clients through trust and mutual respect. Committed to excellence, we dedicate ourselves to ensuring the satisfaction and success of those we serve.

Name: Huslii Homes
Description:
Welcome to Huslii, the innovative leader in constructing eco-friendly and sustainable homes,

Three partners, one shared dream: revolutionize housing with scalable, adaptable, sustainable, and affordable solutions.

Inspired by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s vision of a Beloved Community, we’re dedicated to building a better world where everyone has a place to call home by 2050. Join us in transforming the housing landscape, one home and one community  at a time.

Name: BTicino - Real Estate
Description:
Il progetto di BTicino dedicato al Real Estate. Vi supportiamo nella gestione dei capitolati, in fase di progettazione e di gara d'appalto, con l'intento di costruire una partnership strategica ed essere al vostro fianco a partire da studio e progettazione preliminare fino al completamento del progetto.

Dai un'occhiata alle nostre realizzazioni e ai nostri partner!

Name: FLORIDA NON-PROFIT HOUSING, INC.
Description: Our mission is to ensure the availability of decent, safe and affordable housing for low-income families in rural areas.

Name: Adore Mom
Description: AdoreMOM is an all-in-one senior living resource solution, providing the expertise and right connections to make the best choices when exploring Senior Placement options or Real Estate Solutions for home sales, downsizing and everything that goes along with the transition process for the one you adore here in Omaha, Nebraska and surrounding metro communities. Our placement services and assessments are FREE.

Name: Retired now focused on my charitable work
Description: Abbeyfield South Downs is a charity which provides housing with support for the elderly. Our flagship project in Heathfield is care enabled.  We work to help alleviate loneliness & isolation and to help our residents live fulfilling lives

Name: Mobile Housing Authority
Description:
MHA's Mission:
To create and provide safe, decent and affordable housing opportunities in communities of choice for the people we serve.

MHA's Vision: 
To improve the quality of public housing while enriching family values and providing financial education and empowerment opportunities that will inspire residents to join the ranks of the economically self-sufficient.

Name: Phoenixville Women's Outreach
Description: Phoenixville Women’s Outreach empowers women to self-sufficiency, stability, and independence by providing a comprehensive transitional housing project program, affordable housing, supportive services, advocacy and education.

Name: AccaBi3
Description:
AccaBi3 nasce da un'idea di Paola Bissoli, rappresentante di venditrice al dettaglio e Luigi Hosquet, architetto con oltre 25 anni di esperienza in Italia e all'estero, che unendo le loro competenze hanno voluto creare un servizio completo per il cliente portando sul mercato prodotti in esclusiva e fatti in Italia.

AccaBi3 si occupa di riqualificazione energetica proponendo serramenti, zanzariere e vari sistemi per la protezione dell'immobile dal sole. 
Tutte le soluzione che AccaBi3 vi offre sono supervisionate da Luigi Hosquet che prestando particolare attenzione alla cura dei dettagli, fa si che ogni cliente trovi la soluzione più adatta alle sue esigenze. 

Tutti i prodotti sono su misura e di altissima qualità. Installazione con posa certificata!

Name: Antonio Baston
Description:
L'azienda BASTON ANTONIO nasce nel 1992 nell`area geografica di Bassano del Grappa e si occupa esclusivamente della progettazione di arredamenti su misura.

Da più di vent’anni la ditta Baston lavora nel settore del mobile decorato e realizza arredi unici per eleganza e personalizzazione. I mobili vengono “cuciti” su misura per la casa dei sogni del cliente.

BASTON ANTONIO vanta una struttura di progettazione autonoma ed una capacità interna di realizzazione che la qualifica come partner ideale di architetti e interior designers anche stranieri. Inoltre produce un`ampia gamma di prodotti specificatamente studiati per soddisfare i più diversi gusti e le esigenze dei propri clienti. Si offre inoltre un servizio di progettazione personalizzata che determina lo studio, l`elaborazione e, se richiesta dal cliente, l`installazione.

Name: CANADEVI DELEGACIÓN GUANAJUATO
Description: La CANADEVI Delegación Guanajuato promueve el desarrollo de vivienda para cubrir esta necesidad primaria de las familias y estimula la reactivación de la industria.

Name: Heartset Training Center
Description: Heartset Training Center believes the work of ending homelessness is inseparable from the larger project of ending white supremacy. We hope to challenge stigma by facilitating critical and structural analyses of the power dynamics of care work, examining the ways our care reflects and reinforces the harmful societal power dynamics that led to the need for our services in the first place. We want to inspire helpers and organizations to close the gap between ourselves, and those in need of support. Our aim is to facilitate the mindset, skill set, and perhaps most importantly, the heartset necessary to do the relational work that is required of helpers seeking to end homelessness.

Name: DaySpring Communities
Description:
DaySpring Communities is a network of independent living homes for individuals in need of safe, supportive housing. In a time when isolation has become a major contributor to many of the challenges people face, we believe a shared living model with a community-based approach is essential for people to thrive.

Our permanent supportive housing programs provide residents with the freedom of autonomy alongside the support and companionship of a community. By offering a flexible, cost-effective alternative to traditional renting, we eliminate common barriers such as credit requirements, high deposits, furnishing costs, and fluctuating utility expenses, making stable housing accessible and sustainable.

Name: KEMOPLAST Svet talnih oblog
Description:
Ne glede na to, ali s talnimi oblogami opremljate stanovanjsko hišo, stanovanje, poslovne prostore ali javne zgradbe, je enostavneje, če lahko na enem mestu najdete širok izbor talnih oblog, strokoven nasvet ter sposobno ekipo, ki bo poskrbela za hitro in kakovostno montažo. V podjetju Kemoplast smo prepričani, da smo pravi naslov za vas in, da vam lahko vse to zagotovimo, saj imamo že več kot 30 let izkušenj pri opremljanju individualnih objektov, hotelov, šol, bolnišnic, trgovskih centrov, poslovnih in drugih prostorov.

Skupaj s svojimi partnerji, svetovno znanimi proizvajalci talnih oblog, skrbimo, da smo vedno v koraku s časom in da tudi na slovenski trg pripeljemo tehnološko in oblikovno najbolj inovativne izdelke.

Tehnološko vedno bolj dovršeni postopki obdelave materialov olajšajo vzdrževanje, novi načini polaganja pa nam pomagajo, da je delo zaključeno hitreje in kakovostneje. Z novimi materiali, barvami in vzorci nenehno skrbimo za nove harmonije v prostorih, ki jih opremljamo. Kot najboljši orkester se trudimo, da ustvarjamo najlepše simfonije bivanja.

Name: John Graham Housing & Services
Description: John Graham Housing & Services (JGHS) has a mission to provide emergency shelter, affordable housing, and essential services to individuals and families without a home or facing housing instability. The JGHS mission is strengthened by intensive service coordination at three critical access points—homeless prevention, eviction prevention, and rapid rehousing. With eight properties spread across Addison County, JGHS does this work in collaboration with community partners.

Name: Clay County Habitat for Humanity
Description: Clay County Habitat for Humanity's mission is to build safe, decent, and affordable housing in partnership with the community and God's people in need

Name: Project Home
Description: Project Home (formerly Quality Housing Coalition) is a nonprofit dedicated to creating pathways to stable housing, better health, and financial security for all Mainers.

Name: Brightstar Community
Description:
MISSION:

Brightstar Community's mission is to help women survivors of trafficking, prostitution, and addiction find healing, hope, and freedom. We do this by providing safe and supportive housing, the opportunity for economic independence, and a strong community of advocates and partners.  

We believe that in the end,  love is the most powerful force for change in the world. 

MODEL:
Brightstar Community is a member of the Thistle Farms National Network which is the largest network in the United States committed to a housing-first model for survivors.  Women survivors emerged from Thistle Farms equipped to lead. They are at the helm of this national movement. Advocates, survivors, and artisans know that working together enables all groups to thrive.  Each organization is independent but shares the same core values and is able to sustainably grow and evolve.  There are currently 569 beds across the country for women survivors with 92 sister organizations in our network, with 57 open residential programs and 33 still in development.  Brightstar Community is the ONLY sister organization in the network located in New York State.

Name: Société d'habitation des communautés noires (SHCN)
Description:
La SHCN est un OBNL récemment créé dont la mission est de développer et gérer des projets de logements abordables en plus de promouvoir l'accès au logement pour les communautés noires. Elle veut aussi améliorer les conditions d’habitation des communautés noires en développant des milieux de vie durables, de qualité et adaptés à leurs besoins. Nous ne voulons pas seulement bâtir des maisons, nous voulons également bâtir des communautés. 

Notre MISSION est de développer des solutions d’habitation collective durables pour les individus et les communautés noires afin de créer des milieux de vie de qualité, abordable et sécuritaire. 

Notre vision est d’être la référence en habitation et de créer un avenir où tous les individus des communautés noires ont accès à un logis qui favorise l’épanouissement personnel et social.

Nos valeurs: 
La quête de la qualité et l’excellence dans nos projets 
Agir dans l’intérêt commun de manière responsable et éthique
Respect, confiance mutuelle et ouverture

7 the Landlord maintains total control of tenant approval.  All landlord approved tenants qualify for Jaguar.

Name: Missions Coaching
Description:
Afpols missions Coaching est spécialisée dans le développement de la performance humaine, le savoir-être et le bien-être professionnel d’un salarié ou d’une équipe au service du succès de l’organisation pour les organismes HLM.  
Coaching individuel - Coaching d'équipe / Team building - Codéveloppement managérial et professionnel

> Coaching professionnel individuel
Que vous soyez dirigeant, cadre ou manager, nous vous aidons à 
améliorer vos compétences relationnelles et organisationnelles grâce 
à un accompagnement personnalisé. 

Nos coachs certifiés travaillent avec vous sur vos objectifs professionnels à travers un processus structuré comprenant des rencontres tripartites (manager/coaché/coach) et des séances de coaching.

 Objectifs
 >  atteindre vos objectifs professionnels individuels.
 >  améliorer votre performance quotidienne.
 >  développer vos compétences au service de l’organisation.

 Un cycle de coaching individuel inclut :
 // Un premier contact pour fixer les objectifs en réunion tripartite.
 // 6 à 10 séances de coaching sur une durée de 4 à 6 mois.

> Coaching d’équipe
 améliorez la cohésion et la performance de vos équipes grâce à notre coaching d’équipe. Ce processus interactif aide vos collaborateurs à mieux collaborer, à surmonter les obstacles et à atteindre des objectifs communs.
 
Objectifs
 >  renforcer la cohésion d’équipe.
 >  Développer la productivité et l’efficacité collective.
 >  encourager l’innovation et la créativité au sein de votre groupe.
 
le cycle de coaching d’équipe inclut :
 // une rencontre initiale avec le manager.
 // des entretiens individuels avec chaque membre de l’équipe.
 // Un séminaire de deux jours pour l’ensemble de l’équipe.

Name: OLIVE BRANCH MISSION
Description: OLIVE BRANCH MISSION is a company based out of 6310 S. Claremont Avenue Chicago, Illinois 60636

Name: CareerCrib
Description: CareerCrib is a roommate-matching platform designed for interns and new graduates relocating for work. Our platform helps early-career professionals find compatible roommates, connect with others moving to the same city, and discover reliable housing options through trusted partners. We are a fast-growing startup building the future of early-career relocation and housing solutions.

Name: InternEase

Simplify Intern Housing - One bulk rate, hassle-free, for luxury accommodations.
Stay tuned for more!

Name: Habitat for Humanity of Mesa County
Description: Habitat for Humanity of Mesa County 's mission is constructing simple, decent, and affordable housing in partnership with families, volunteers, and the community for all God's people in need.

Name: No Homeless Veterans
Description:
The No Homeless Veterans campaign is led by the Cobseo Housing Cluster, and coordinated by Stoll in partnership with Homeless Link and the National Housing Federation. Together, we are working to reduce homelessness among veterans. 
Check out our free toolkits, factsheets and templates for local authorities, housing associations and supported housing providers, and watch our recorded training sessions for housing staff. Info in the Resources section of our website.
. #NoHomelessVeterans #ThinkVeteran

Description: Realizziamo la casa dei tuoi sogni

Description:

in Case private, Condomini ed Edifici commerciali.

Offre un servizio di manutenzione degli impianti di sollevamento per edifici residenziali e commerciali.

Name: ALER Bergamo, Lecco e Sondrio
Description: ALER Bergamo - Lecco - Sondrio (Azienda Lombarda per l'Edilizia Residenziale Bergamo, Lecco e Sondrio) è strumento del quale Regione Lombardia e gli Enti locali si avvalgono per la gestione unitaria del patrimonio di edilizia residenziale pubblica e per l’esercizio delle rispettive funzioni nel campo delle politiche abitative, con particolare attenzione alla loro funzione sociale.

Name: casa viva
Description: Somos una empresa especializada en la venta de lotes rurales para proyectos de vivienda, cumpliendo el sueño de aquellas familia colombianas.

Name: Temple Future Owners
Description:
Temple can help you achieve your dream of owning a home through its Temple Future Owners Program. Our program was founded on the belief that the traditional mortgage system often doesn't work for everyone. 

Many people, who are committed to home ownership, are held back by high down payments, strict eligibility requirements, and other financial barriers. That's why we have developed a program that makes it easier for people to access the resources they need to achieve their goals.  

For further information visit www.templefutureowners.com

Name: Hebron Housing
Description:
We believe every woman with the courage and commitment to change her life should be able to access a safe and supportive place to call home.

Working in partnership with local authorities and key services across Norfolk, we support the ongoing need for homes in our community for any woman who has faced challenges in her life.

With our continued commitment to our values, our people create a safe and nurturing environment built on mutual respect and accountability. Supporting each woman on their own journey, we help to develop essential life skills and create opportunities for a future filled with love, happiness and hope.

Name: Villa Primavera Constructora e Inmobiliaria
Description: Somo un proyecto inmobiliaria ubicado en el puerto de Ilo donde albergaremos más de 7mil personas

Name: Indiana Affiliation of Recovery Residences- INARR
Description: Our mission is to support persons in recovery from addiction by improving their access to quality recovery residences through standards, support services, placement, education, research, and advocacy.

Name: Association d'aide au Logement des Sans-Abri
Description:
L’association pour le Logement des Sans-Abri – ALSA intervient auprès de personnes en situation de marginalité,  sur les territoires de Mulhouse Alsace Agglomération et du Pays du Sundgau. Ces personnes sont pour la plupart bénéficiaires de minima sociaux.

ALSA a un très  bas seuil d’admission et un haut  seuil de tolérance. L’association a inscrit dans ses statuts une clause de non-abandon.

L’objectif est, par un accompagnement social adapté, en face à face, et par des actions collectives, de permettre aux personnes de s’ancrer dans un temps et un lieu qui leur permettent de retrouver une appartenance sociale.

L’ALSA essaie d’être une anse accueillante et sécurisante, où des bateaux à la dérive, qui ont essuyé quelques coups de vent, peuvent venir s’abriter. Certains vont réparer, calfater, et repartir. Il y en a qui reviendront, après avoir encore essuyé une tempête, d’autres, nous n’en aurons plus de nouvelles. D’autres encore jetteront l’ancre et y resteront.

ALSA est une association de droit local, sans but lucratif, et est reconnue de mission d’utilité publique.

Name: Quality Housing Coalition
Description: QHC secures stable housing, good health, and financial security for low income adults and children in Maine.

Name: Quantum Housing Association
Description: Quantum Housing Association is an Intensive Housing Management (IHM) company who works with industry leaders in the housing sector including Housing Associations and Care Providers up and down the UK. Our core qualities are filled with it’s uncompromising drive and ambition to deliver key housing management and services for our clients.

Name: LEVEL: Equity Building
Description:
LEVEL: Equity Buildings (LEVEL) is a 501c3 nonprofit providing a holistic, system-innovating program model to develop homeowners, housing stock, and communities at a pace complementing each other.

LEVEL is a long term solution to address housing inequity and facilitate dignified, affordable homeownership opportunities for existing residents. 

Working at the intersection of Asset-Based Community Development principles and market-based realities, we are invited into neighborhoods and work alongside and in the community to move its residents into sustainable homeownership.

Our process includes the collection and mapping of community data which informs and drives all decision making and investment strategies. This data and shared resources, strategically working together,  to help facilitate opportunities for homeownership, small business start-ups, workforce development, education, health, arts and culture, youth development, food access and anything else that might be discovered – the possibilities are truly endless.

Name: Vertical Costruzioni & Servizi
Description: Impresa specializzata nei lavori su fune, operazioni in quota e Sistemi Costruttivi a Secco

Name: CFDT LogiRep
Description: Bienvenue sur notre page d'information dédié aux salariés de LogiRep. Vous trouverez des informations concernant vos droits ainsi que les négociations syndicales en cours avec la direction. Les élections syndicales approchent, rejoignez-nous !

Name: Healthy Homes
Description:
HealthyHomes works in partnership with Housing Associations and Landlords to ensure that buildings are energy-efficient, mould-free and safe to live in.

Since 2017, HealthyHomes from ZapCarbon has been partnering with UK Landlords and Housing Associations to deliver a programme addressing issues including Category 1 & 2 damp and mould hazards. Assessing, treating and monitoring mould and damp in the home is all managed and delivered by experienced teams, and by using smart sensors and monitoring real time data. The programme is the first of its kind, and has already had a positive impact on thousands of residents.

Name: مؤسسة عين الوطنيه للمقاولات العامة
Description: تخلق عين الوطنية بيئات مستجيبة ومتكيفة وجذابة ومثيرة. نعتقد أن العمارة والبناء والبيئات مترابطة بعمق ، وأن لكل واحدة وتأثيرًا على الأخرى. نحن مبتكرون ورشيقون. نحن حديثون ولدينا قيم جمالية تقليدية. يأتي كل عضو في فريقنا بمجموعة فريدة من المهارات ، ونعمل معًا على إنشاء مبانٍ متميزة عن البقية بينما تتلاءم بشكل متناغم وجميل.

Name: Way Back Inn Foundation
Description: We provide transitional housing to families in need of housing, while helping them rebuild their lives, dignity, & self-confidence.

Name: Sihlangu Properties
Description:
Sihlangu Properties perfectly combines modern, stylish living with a wide range of excellent amenities and convenient access to schools, shopping centres, workplaces, public transport and freeways, in a welcoming, well-established community. 

We provide high-quality and secure homes in flourishing communities with easy access to ample amenities at affordable prices. We focus on affordability in everything that we do. We are the partner of choice for affordable and high-quality rental homes.

Name: The ADU Center
Description:
We support homeowners in building ADUs through providing resources and offering support throughout the process. 

An ADU is a flexible space that grows with your family. From space for your loved ones to supporting the community and building your retirement through renting, your ADU will grow with you. 

By building an ADU, you’re investing in the future of your community. ADUs not only benefit homeowners, but also help the community as well. Building ADUs helps to address the housing challenges in California, and ADUs often provide homes for school teachers, firefighters, and other community members who otherwise may have to commute long distances from outside Napa, Sonoma and Marin to find a home they can afford.
