L’association se propose de favoriser l’autonomie des jeunes, l’accès pour tous à un logement, l’insertion professionnelle, la citoyenneté, la santé, la culture, dans le cadre des activités de jeunesse et d’éducation populaire, le tout dans un esprit humaniste et prenant en compte le développement durable.

Name: ATER Verona
Description: ATER Verona è l'ente pubblico economico strumentale della Regione Veneto che si occupa di edilizia residenziale popolare nella città di Verona e nella sua Provincia.

Name: Destiny Residential Services
Description:
We are a housing stabilization services company dedicated to helping individuals and families in our community maintain stable and secure housing.

Our team has extensive experience in working with tenants, landlords, and housing providers to ensure that everyone has access to safe and affordable housing. 

At our company, we believe that housing is a basic human right, and we are committed to helping our clients overcome any challenges they may face in obtaining and maintaining stable housing. We offer a range of services, including rental assistance, eviction prevention, and advocacy. 

Our goal is to empower our clients to achieve long-term stability and success.

Name: Ensemble2générations Alsace
Description:
Fondée en mars 2024,  l'association ensemble2générations Alsace a pour ambition de "Donner vie à la vieillesse et sens à la jeunesse" au travers un dispositif de cohabitation intergénérationnelle. 

Notre mission est de permettre à des jeunes de moins de 30ans et des séniors de plus de 60ans de vivre une expérience unique de solidarité intergénérationnelle, sous le signe de la confiance, en vivant sous le même toit. 

Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
Pour les jeunes, c'est une opportunité exceptionnelle de trouver un logement abordable, de se consacrer pleinement à leurs études ou de démarrer sereinement leur parcours professionnel sans les contraintes financières, et de vivre une expérience enrichissante en partageant le quotidien de nos aînés.
Pour les séniors, c'est l'occasion de rompre l'isolement et la solitude, de recevoir une aide précieuse au quotidien, et de tisser des liens forts avec une jeune génération, restant acteur dans notre société.

Notre Engagement :
Nous prenons en compte la personnalité et les besoins spécifiques de chacun pour construire de belles histoires. Nous accompagnons nos bénéficiaires tout au long de leur cohabitation par une présence attentive et bienveillante.

Rejoignez-nous ! 

Ensemble, créons des liens solides entre les générations et vivons une aventure humaine inoubliable. 

Contactez-nous et embarquez dans cette belle aventure intergénérationnelle en Alsace !

Name: Greenhills property investments ltd
Description:
Greenhills Property Investments Ltd has a successful track record of developing and investing in property across the East Midlands.  Our ethos revolves around working in partnership with people including occupiers, investors and landowners.  Greenhills professionalism, innovation and hands on approach to every project ensures that we retain a strong reputation across the property industry.
Our business has two distinct arms: Greenhills Property Investments Ltd is the investment arm of Greenhills Group, offering both individuals and institutions a versatile product range with attractive rates of return from a proven company track record of delivery. Greenhills Construction delivers high quality residential and commercial conversions right from inception to the completion of the construction of the building.
Greenhills has an on-going requirement for land or property suitable for development throughout East Midlands.
If you think you may have a potential development site please do contact us for a no-obligation chat. Our land acquisition team will quickly be able to assess the suitability and potential value of a site and we will consider purchases either subject to planning or unconditionally.
Our architects design schemes that look to maximise the value of a site whilst retaining and enhancing local character.
Sites considered:
 Individual houses with large gardens
 Land assembly including multiple garden schemes of existing properties.
 Existing residential or commercial buildings which have fallen into disrepair.
 Commercial properties that could be considered for change of use to residential.

Name: Reliable Residence
Description: Reliable Residence in Madison, provides monthly furnished housing for travel nurses, medical students, and other healthcare professionals. We offer affordable & reliable housing near the University of Wisconsin Health System, Meriter, St. Mary's & more!

Name: Lojega
Description: Lojega est une société immobilière de service public (SISP) qui gère plus de 2500 logements sociaux dans les communes de Jette et Ganshoren. Outre la mise à disposition de logements décents à un prix adapté aux revenus de ses locataires, la société a pour vocation l’émancipation de ces derniers dans la vie de quartier en proposant diverses activités avec des partenaires de terrain. Elle est sous la tutelle de la SLRB (société du logement de la Région de Bruxelles-Capitale).

Name: Aboriginal Women & Children's Crisis Service
Description:
The Aboriginal Women & Children’s Crisis Service fundamentally believes in, values and respects the rights of Aboriginal women and children in relation to a life free of violence and oppression.

The Service receives funding from the Department of Communities and Justice to assist Aboriginal women and their dependent children escaping Domestic and/or Family Violence.

The Aboriginal Women & Children’s Crisis Service acknowledges the emotional, social, physical, and psychological effects of colonisation on Aboriginal people. It also recognises that the legacy of colonisation is not in the past and that it continues to impact in a myriad of ways on the lives of Aboriginal people, including their housing, health, mental health and wellbeing.

The staff specialise in delivering a holistic, spiritual and culturally-sensitive approach when supporting Aboriginal women and children who have escaped Domestic and/or Family Violence.
The Service supports Aboriginal women and children through advocacy and referral to various services on behalf of the clients to apply for Apprehended Violence Orders, access crisis accommodation, legal support, housing, women’s health centres, and various government departments.

The Aboriginal Women and Children’s Crisis Service acknowledges that children who access our services require individual trauma-informed care for various complex needs. Children are treated as clients in their own right, and are offered the full range of services available under the guidance of their accompanying parent or carer. Children receive culturally-appropriate case management under the guidance of their accompanying parent or carer.

Name: AGIS 06
Description:
Agence Immobilière à Vocation Sociale, AGIS 06 aide chaque année plus de 100 foyers à améliorer leurs conditions d’habitat en logeant des ménages en difficultés dans l’habitat privé.

AGIS 06, outre son engagement associatif, apporte une expertise professionnelle, une prospection immobilière, la possibilité pour le propriétaire de déduire jusqu’à 85% de ses revenus fonciers, un diagnostic technique, une gestion locative sociale, et un accompagnement social des familles.

NOS VALEURS
Le logement n’est pas une fin en soi, ni non plus la fin d’un parcours. Il ne s’agit pas de « caser » un « cas » mais de développer dans nos villes ségrégatives un habitat favorisant la rencontre, l’échange, une certaine mixité des âges, des fonctions, des milieux, un goût du « vivre ensemble ». Il s’agit au fond de donner un sens au « logement social »

AGIS 06 c'est :
- un siège social à Nice Ouest
- une antenne à Nice Centre doublée d'un Service Jeunesse
- une pension de famille à Vence
- une antenne à Antibes

Name: Threshold Housing Society
Description: At Threshold Housing Society, we offer more than a safe environment: we provide a community for at-risk youth in Greater Victoria to call home. A place filled with support, understanding, and sanctuary, without judgement, where you're accepted for who you are.

Name: Sharing with Friends Foundation Queensland
Description:
Our mission is to design and help deliver affordable, safe secure housing for older women to live in privacy, with dignity and in a supportive community as they age. 
We do this by providing a small co-housing community of 5 older women through a shared equity model where the residents choose who they live with in their community.

Name: Adelaide Workers' Homes Incorporated
Description: Adelaide Workers’ Homes Incorporated was founded as a progressive organisation based on the simple belief that people deserve access to affordable housing. The issue of affordable housing is every bit as contemporary today as it was when Sir Thomas Elder founded the not-for-profit organisation in 1898.

Name: The Bernie House
Description:
The Bernie House provides survivors of domestic violence and their families transitional housing and services to promote financial stability. The Bernie House allows families the necessary time to heal and build confidence as they start their transition to permanent housing. Families stay with TBH for up to two years and live in a genuine family environment. TBH provides individualized important support structures for victims to secure a job, go to school, become economically stable, and achieve a safe and healthy return to their community – all vital to their success. No longer Victims, they are Survivors – Thrivers – Conquerors!

Lives are transformed at The Bernie House. Our clients: bloom – gain self-respect again – earn their GED’s – become gainfully employed – and earn college scholarships. The quiet, insecure child: learns to laugh again – becomes happy and healthy and learns that a relationship does not have to hurt.
The family is up lifted with support from several agencies and organizations that provide counseling, job training and placement assistance, adult education, child advocacy and day care.
The adult is required to make monthly payments on utilities and a minimal program fee. All program fees collected are returned upon successful completion of the program. In addition, the family is invited to take the furnishings and items in the home. This provides a solid foundation as they move on to a more permanent house.

Name: Metrina
Description: Metrina is a real estate tokenization startup that facilitates crowdfunding to build real estate. The Metrina platform allows investors to purchase fractional real estate. By leveraging the Ethereum blockchain, Metrina's tokenization process provides transparency and asset liquidity.

Name: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY QUAD CITIES
Description: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY QUAD CITIES is a nonprofit housing organization based in Davenport, IA, serving Scott County IA and Rock Island County, IL. We are empowered by God to build and renovate homes, to revitalize our community and to restore hope.  We envision a world where everyone has a decent and affordable place to live. We help make homeownership affordable through our homebuilding, home repair, and wheelchair ramp programs. We could not do what we do without the support of our amazing volunteers!

Name: Fédération des OSBL d'Habitation du Bas-Saint-Laurent, de la Gaspésie et des Îles
Description: Depuis 2008, la Fédération des OSBL d’habitation du Bas-Saint-Laurent, de la Gaspésie et des Îles (FOHBGI) a pour mission de favoriser l’accès au logement communautaire en représentant, en soutenant et en accompagnant les OSBL d’habitation. La FOHBGI représente fièrement plus de 125 organismes qui permettent d’étendre à toute la société l’accès à des logements sains et dignes, peu importe leur situation ou leurs besoins particuliers.

Name: Help The Host Ltd
Description:
UK- Based Property Management Company

Helping Your Property Reach It’s Full Potential

Name: ZPOT
Description: NL Realty beheerd huisvesting voor NL-Jobs maar verhuurd ook aan derden.

Name: Ministry of Housing and Urban Planning
Description: The Ministry of Housing and Urban Planning provides many housing services to citizens Among these services: Housing financing services, service of housing units, residential plots service.

Name: AFIPADE
Description: L'AFIPADE est une association loi 1901 ayant pour objet la gestion et l'animation de dispositifs départementaux de gestion des demandes de logement social. A ce titre, elle rassemble en son sein les personnes morales assurant le service d'enregistrement des demandes de logement social dans un même département et est chargée de veiller au bon fonctionnement du système sur plan technique et déontologique.

Name: Capuche
Description:
L’association Capuche a été créée dans le but d’aider des personnes en situation de précarité sociale, essentiellement le public jeune de 16 à 25 ans en situation de vulnérabilité, dans l’accès à l’autonomie et l’accès à un logement, par la captation et la création de logements pérennes, salubres et abordables et par la mise en place de projets innovants (coordination de ressources des différents partenaires mandatés ou non en matière de logement, accompagnement de projet, prêt de garantie locative, information, rédaction de plaidoyer, etc.).

La stratégie de Capuche consiste à développer un programme de Housing First 4 Youth (HF4Y) sur la Région Bruxelles Capitale.

Name: Itea Spa
Description:
ITEA S.p.A. - Istituto Trentino per l’Edilizia Abitativa S.p.A. è una società di capitali in controllo pubblico costituita ai sensi e per gli effetti dell'art. 7 della Legge Provinciale 7 novembre 2005, n. 15 del Socio unico la Provincia Autonoma di Trento. 
La Società cura tutte le fasi di generazione, accrescimento, mantenimento e gestione del patrimonio immobiliare e dell’offerta locativa per soddisfare il fabbisogno abitativo secondo quanto prescritto dalla normativa in materia di politica provinciale per la casa.

Name: NL Realty
Description: NL Realty beheerd huisvesting voor NL-Jobs maar verhuurd ook aan derden.

Name: PASCHECK
Description:
At PasCheck, we are dedicated to providing independent guidance and support throughout the PAS2035 retrofit process, based on an evidence based approach where each home genuinely matters. We work closely with assessors to ensure that the data collected is reliable enough to provide a basis for modelling the best solutions for every property.
Our services include:
•	Bespoke surveys to assess and analyse housing stock for social housing, Eco 4 and private clients
•	Compliance support for retrofit assessors and admin staff
•	Retrofit Coordination and assessment feedback at an early stage of the project
•	Energy modelling to provide reliable predictions on Sap and Space Heating Demand outcomes
•	Ventilation Strategies to meet or exceed Part L and Pas 2035 requirements
•	Retrofit Designs to provide the best outcomes for all of your properties

Name: Housing For Health OC
Description:
Orange County's Homeless Housing and Service Provider.
Providing access to emergency shelter beds, rapid
rehousing, transitional housing, and permanent
supportive housing with navigation and housing wrap
around services.

Name: PG Buddy
Description: Easy Stay

Name: CityTeam Portland
Description:
In the United States, prosperity and opportunity have blossomed, yet so many people have been left behind. High cost of living, lack of affordable housing, and mental health challenges are intensifying the hardships of poverty, hunger, homelessness and addiction in our cities.

Our most vulnerable neighbors must be recognized if we want to see our communities thrive – from the family struggling to put a meal on the table, to the mother seeking refuge with her children, to the unseen neighbor trapped in the chains of addictive behavior.

The need is great. But together, we can bring radical restoration to our cities.

Name: Urban Ristrutturazioni
Description: La capacità di integrare la qualità dei materiali con la professionalità nelle ristrutturazioni è il punto di forza di Urban Ristrutturazioni. Sulla base delle esigenze dei nostri clienti forniamo consulenze e servizi di progettazione personalizzati, coordinati da un unico referente dall’inizio alla fine dei lavori, mantenendo i costi competitivi, riducendo al minimo le complessità organizzative e i tempi di lavoro

Name: Instituto Nacional de Vivienda y Urbanismo
Description:
Somos una institución autónoma de la República de Costa Rica creada en 1954 por medio de la Ley Orgánica N° 1788.

Descentralizada estructurada, especializada y con recursos jurídicos, administrativos, técnicos y financieros; cuyo objetivo es atender las necesidades actuales y futuras de la población costarricense en el ámbito de la provisión de vivienda y ordenamiento territorial. 

De esta manera, el INVU participa activamente en la búsqueda de soluciones de vivienda, congruentes con las políticas y lineamientos de ordenamiento territorial, que permitan brindar respuesta a las necesidades de la población media y de interés social del país.

Name: Noah's Ark Housing
Description: Noah's Ark Housing offers affordable housing to homeless, unhoused or displaced adults in a shared living environment. Whether you are looking for temporary, short or long term housing, we will work with you to provide housing in a safe, clean, spacious environment.

Name: Vitacorps
Description:
Vitacorps is dedicated to transforming the residential experience, with a specialized focus on improving the health, quality of life and readiness of military personnel through scientifically validated wellness solutions. Our comprehensive 7-step program is engineered to enhance indoor air and water quality, excess humidity and lighting conditions to meet or exceed certifiable health standards, leveraging evidence-based research to create healthier living environments without major infrastructure investments or resident disruptions.

We are committed to:
●	Empowering residents through improved environmental conditions in their homes
●	Providing innovative wellness solutions that meet or exceed leading health standards
●	Promoting resident health through healthy homes

Our approach is rooted in our collaboration with healthy building experts like the Well Living Lab, founded as a Mayo Clinic and Delos collaboration, to deliver scalable, scientifically-validated solutions that enhance human well-being and operational effectiveness.

Name: Alliance Bruxelloise Coopérative (ABC)
Description: L'Alliance Bruxelloise Coopérative est une Société Immobilière de Service Public de la Région de Bruxelles-Capitale. Elle gère un patrimoine de près de 2500 logements, répartis sur 5 sites : Cobralo (Uccle), Kapelleveld (WSL et WSP), Les Locataires Réunis (WSL), Messidor (Forest et Uccle), Moortebeek (Anderlecht).

Name: Clear Horizon Recovery
Description: Providing supportive living, sober transports, and case management in North Austin, TX.

Name: WELL fabriek
Description:
Wij zijn WELL fabriek. Onze drijfveer is werkomgevingen te creëren waar mensen energie van krijgen en meer uit zichzelf en hun werk kunnen halen.
 
Wij geloven dat een gezonde werkomgeving bijdraagt aan het welbevinden van medewerkers en daarmee het succes van de onderneming. Mensen zijn productiever, gelukkiger en energieker. En aangezien personeelskosten het grootste deel van de bedrijfskosten zijn, is het ook slim hier aandacht aan te besteden. Door hogere productiviteit, lager ziekteverzuim en minder personeelsverloop laat de investering zich snel terugverdienen.
 
Zoals de bedrijfsnaam al zegt, gebruiken we de methodiek van de WELL Building Standard als basis van ons werk. Maar dit is niet volledig. Wij gaan in onze aanpak verder en hanteren daarbij de volgende 4 pijlers:
- Building: gezond gebouw
- Body: fysieke gezondheid
- Brain: psychische gezondheid
- Behaviour: werk- en gedragspatronen
Onze inzet ondersteunt goed werkgeverschap. Wij helpen u om hierin onderscheidend te zijn. Door onze energieke aanpak en intrinsieke drijfveren staat de WELL fabriek voor een succesvol traject! Nieuwsgierig geworden? Neem gerust contact met ons op!

Name: ROMEL
Description: Le ROMEL est un organisme de charité enregistré, dont la mission principale est d’aider les personnes les plus vulnérables à accéder à un logement décent, abordable et convenant à leurs besoins. Particulièrement soucieux des conditions de logement des communautés ethnoculturelles, et plus particulièrement celles des nouveaux arrivants, le ROMEL s’est engagé depuis sa fondation à lutter contre la discrimination en habitation.

Name: Wiping Borders
Description:
At Wiping Borders, we help newcomers to Canada secure housing with confidence. Our innovative services, including the Newcomer Score and Rent Guarantee Service, provide fair and transparent solutions for individuals without a Canadian credit history.

We also support private sponsor groups in fulfilling their housing commitments for refugees by offering tailored consulting and housing assistance.

Our mission is simple: to break down barriers and create pathways to secure, stable housing for everyone.

Helping newcomers build a home in Canada.

Name: Housing Authority of San Luis Obispo
Description:
The Housing Authority of San Luis Obispo is committed to building and maintaining affordable housing for citizens in our community.  We seek to create safe neighborhoods by partnering with individuals and organizations to provide housing, education and employment opportunities for families of modest means to become self-sufficient and improve their quality of life.

Our goal is to provide decent, safe and affordable housing for eligible residents of the County of San Luis Obispo, and to manage the Section 8 program with good, financially sound property management practices.  We are committed to serving each Section 8 applicant and participant as well as the entire community in a manner that demonstrates professional courtesy, compassion and respect.

Name: Built for Zero UK
Description:
A part of Crisis UK - we work to bring the Built for Zero methodology to the UK and prove that homelessness can be ended.

Currently working in Brent, Rhondda Cynon Taf, and Calderdale.

Name: 12Modulize
Description:
Voor gemeenten, kwekers en telers, projectontwikkelaars en investeerders.

Onze visie
12Modulize streeft naar een toekomst waarin iedereen toegang heeft tot betaalbare, veilige en duurzame woonoplossingen, ongeacht hun situatie. We willen leidend zijn in het bieden van flexibele woningen voor verschillende doelgroepen en bijdragen aan oplossingen voor de toenemende behoefte aan tijdelijke huisvesting in Nederland. Onze visie is om in samenwerking met projectontwikkelaars, gemeenten, particuliere ontwikkelaars, telers, kwekers en overige huisvesters flexibele woningen te realiseren die voldoen aan de hoogste normen en tegelijkertijd inspelen op maatschappelijke behoeften. 

Onze missie
Onze missie is om hoogwaardige, betaalbare en flexibele woonoplossingen te leveren die snel inzetbaar en aanpasbaar zijn aan de behoeften van vluchtelingen, arbeidsmigranten, studenten en andere doelgroepen. Door te focussen op kostenbesparing, regelgevingscompliance en klanttevredenheid, streven we ernaar om voor iedereen een veilige woonomgeving te creëren en daarmee bij te dragen aan de maatschappij. Wij zijn toegewijd aan het leveren van wooneenheden die voldoen aan de SNF-normen en het Bouwbesluit, en willen een betrouwbare partner zijn voor beleggers, gemeenten en projectontwikkelaars.

Name: Atlantique Accession Solidaire
Description: Atlantique Accession Solidaire est l'Organisme de Foncier Solidaire de la Loire-Atlantique. Cette structure coopérative développe dans ce département une offre de logement en accession à la propriété dans le cadre du Bail Réel Solidaire.

Name: Fédération des OSBL d'habitation de l'Outaouais (FOHO)
Description:
La Fédération des OSBL d’habitation de l’Outaouais, anciennement appelée Regroupement des OSBL d’habitation avec support communautaire en Outaouais, a été fondée en 1998. À l’époque, l’organisme comptait quatre membres.

À travers les années, la fédération a réussi à s’imposer dans la région de l’Outaouais en développant une expertise remarquable et reconnue dans le domaine du développement de logements communautaires. De plus, la FOHO joue le rôle de catalyseur et de mobilisateur auprès de ses membres et des partenaires du milieu. Elle compte aujourd’hui 64 membres, tous œuvrant pour le même but : permettre aux populations vulnérables de l’Outaouais d’accéder à une stabilité résidentielle et une meilleure qualité de vie.

Name: Thistle & Nest
Description:
Para obtener atención gratuita en español, escríbanos a espanol@thistleandnest.org.

Thistle & Nest is a nonprofit organization that believes homeownership should be an opportunity, not a barrier. We create lasting homeownership opportunities for low- and moderate-income households in Central Oregon. By bridging the gap between affordability and long-term stability, we help families build wealth, strengthen communities, and achieve housing security.

Our work goes beyond housing. We advocate for equitable access to homeownership, provide guidance throughout the buying process, and ensure homeowners have the resources they need for long-term success. Through strategic partnerships and community collaboration, we’re making homeownership a reality for more households in Bend, Madras, and Prineville.

Join us in building a future where stable, affordable homeownership is within reach.

Name: Housing Authority of the City of Pueblo
Description: The mission of the Housing Authority of the City of Pueblo is to provide low-income families, the elderly and handicapped individuals with decent, safe and affordable housing.

Name: ESB Group
Description:
Offriamo una struttura completa che ottimizza le capacità tecniche, operative, amministrative, gestionali e finanziarie dei partner, garantendo un servizio completo e su misura per il cliente.

ESB Group è frutto della sinergia tra Newark Engineering Srl, esperti in progettazione architettonica e ingegneristica per committenti pubblici e privati, lo Studio di consulenza Boschetti, attivo dal 1965 nel diritto e nell'economia e Oceania SRL un punto di riferimento nel settore edile.

Noi di ESB Group forniamo consulenza legale, societaria, tributaria e del lavoro alle aziende. Con un team di specialisti altamente qualificati, ci distinguiamo come punto di riferimento nel miglioramento sismico e nella riqualificazione energetica.

Name: Dehleez Associates
Description: Dehleez - Real Estate is the best website for selling houses, apartments, villas etc.

Name: Canadian City Gwadar
Description: The Canadian City Gwadar, spread over 346 and approved by GDA (Gwadar Development Authority) and included in the “A” Category of Gwadar’s Master plan, A Canadian City Gwadar offers premium housing and commercial projects located at the heart of Gwadar.

Name: Coopérative la Ciguë
Description: Coopérative de logement pour personnes en formation

Name: Cedar Creek Lodge - Boutique Senior Living
Description:
Cedar Creek Lodge is located in a historic and “Texas Main Street City” in Gun Barrel City, Texas. We pride ourselves on compassionate support, cutting-edge programming, health & wellness programs, and an excellent care team. Here, our residents enjoy a relaxed ambiance with opportunities for engaging, exploring and staying connected. Add our rustic views and you have a lifestyle that welcomes and restores.

Whether you occasionally need assistance with activities of daily living, or desire a more secure, maintenance-free lifestyle, Cedar Creek Lodge is an excellent choice. Here you can relax, have fun and enjoy all that life offers. Our lovely, private suites are thoughtfully designed to offer comfortable and gracious living without the home maintenance.

Name: Real Homing
Description: Explore a selection of Flats, Villas & Rented Apartments. Our services are delivered with complete transparency & trust. Better Homing with Real Homing.

Name: Rehabilita Andalucia
Description: Red de Oficinas para información, promoción y difusión de las ayudas destinadas a la rehabilitación energética de edificios residenciales. Plan Eco Vivienda, Junta de Andalucía, plan de recuperación, transformación y resiliencia del Gobierno de España, Next Generation EU.

Name: Refuge for Women Pittsburgh
Description:
Refuge for Women is expanding its evidenced-based, trauma-informed program to Pittsburgh, first by opening an Emergency Home for survivors referred by law enforcement, healthcare and service providers, and self-identified. Complementing the work of local leading nonprofits who serve individuals experiencing crisis, homelessness, and mental health issues,
our Emergency Housing will offer Care and Comfort, Treatment and Stabilization and Outreach and Education.

The mission of Refuge for Women, a national, faith-based nonprofit with 10 sites in 5 states that has supported 400+ survivors, is to empower sexually exploited women to live a life of freedom through residential healing programs. In 2009, we began to pioneer a unique multisite continuum of care model, helping women move from dangerous situations into free and safe housing, with trauma informed healing and life skills programming supported by licensed professionals and 24/7 staffing.

Name: South Suburban PADS (SSPADS)
Description: South Suburban PADS was founded in 1990 by community leaders who were motivated by their faith and values to help people overcome homelessness. Their inspiring vision called up community volunteers to provide Public Action to Deliver Shelter (PADS). Their efforts helped open the first church-based emergency shelters just in time for Christmas. Today, their legacy endures as thousands of people volunteer every year to continue providing shelter, meals, affordable housing, and services to help people overcome homelessness and build brighter futures.

Name: Routes to Housing - SFHA
Description: The Routes to Housing project looks to inspire young individuals to pursue careers in the housing sector and view housing as a career destination of choice. The project promotes the importance of housing as a profession, spreads awareness of the various opportunities available and showcases the benefits whilst also defining career pathways within the sector, addressing skills shortages and promoting staff development.

Name: Sisters of Charity Housing Development Corporation
Description: The Sisters of Charity Housing Development Corporation (SCHDC) is a not-for-profit organization established in the 1980s to provide affordable and supportive housing in New York. It is a sponsored ministry of the Sisters of Charity of New York, who have been serving New York’s most vulnerable residents since 1817. SCHDC operates, develops, and advocates for affordable and supportive housing in New York State and beyond. Today 100% of the units within SCHDC’s portfolio are affordable housing units, serving the elderly, special needs populations, and formerly homeless.

Name: Seine Habitat
Description:
Seine Habitat est une Entreprise Sociale pour l'Habitat (ESH) engagée dans la construction et la gestion de logements accessibles sur les communes d’Elbeuf et Petit-Quevilly. 

Depuis le 1er janvier 2021, Seine Habitat est fièrement membre associé de Rouen Métropole Habitat, qui regroupe quatre autres bailleurs dynamiques sur la Métropole Rouen Normandie : Le Foyer du Toit Familial, Quevilly Habitat, Rouen Habitat et la SIEMOR. Cette collaboration enrichit notre offre de services et renforce notre engagement envers le développement de logements de qualité.

Notre mission : répondre aux besoins en logement de notre communauté tout en favorisant la cohésion sociale et l'intégration des locataires.

Name: Monde en Marge Monde en Marche
Description:
Monde en Marge | Monde en Marche (M&M)
Un toit, un tremplin, une communauté solidaire.
Depuis 2003, M&M lutte contre le mal-logement en Essonne avec une conviction forte : chaque personne mérite un logement digne, un accompagnement humain et la possibilité de reconstruire sa vie.

Chez M&M, l’accueil et l’entraide sont au cœur de tout.
Notre modèle unique, alliant solidité, innovation sociale et ancrage local, propose une réponse concrète à l’exclusion résidentielle :
 Logements tremplins pour familles en difficulté
 Pensions de famille pour personnes isolées
 Hébergements sécurisés pour femmes victimes de violences.

Notre force ?  Un accompagnement sur-mesure, assuré par un binôme travailleur social / bénévole, pour guider chaque bénéficiaire vers une autonomie durable.
 Parce qu’un logement est bien plus qu’un abri : c’est le socle d’une vie digne.
 Objectif 2025 :
• Étendre notre offre
• Renforcer notre accompagnement
• Mobiliser davantage de partenaires
• Faire entendre notre voix dans le débat public

 Déjà plus de 150 logements gérés en Essonne, avec de nouveaux projets de construction en cours pour répondre à l’urgence sociale.

 Aujourd’hui, nous avons besoin de vous !
Pour finaliser un projet clé : des logements sécurisés pour des femmes victimes de violences et leurs enfants.

 Votre soutien peut transformer une vie.
 Envie d’agir concrètement ?
 Devenez bénévole : même une heure par mois peut tout changer.
 Entreprise ou fondation ? Engagez-vous comme partenaire mécène et faites grandir notre impact.

Name: Housing Authority of the City of Santa Barbara
Description: Our mission is to create safe, affordable, and quality housing opportunities for families and individuals while promoting self-sufficiency and neighborhood revitalization.

Name: linu GmbH
Description: Bau und Projektierung von Wohn- und gewerblichen Gebäuden, sowie der Import und Export von Kautschuk und alle damit verbundenen Tätigkeiten.

Name: Floodix
Description:
Floodix är en AI-driven plattform som förenklar hela processen kring byggmöten – från planering till protokoll och signering. 

Med funktioner som automatiskt genererade mötesprotokoll, inspelning och transkribering, samt AI-baserad sammanfattning och åtgärdslistor, sparar du både tid och administration. 

Protokoll kan enkelt redigeras, delas och signeras digitalt. Alla möten samlas per projekt, och du kan enkelt bjuda in beställare och deltagare med full insyn. 

Floodix är byggt för branschen – snabbt, säkert och användarvänligt.

Name: Missions Copropriété
Description:
Missions Copropriété vous accompagne dans la gestion de 
votre patrimoine locatif en copropriété, en vous aidant à structurer 
vos processus pour répondre aux exigences spécifiques de ce 
statut. 

Nous offrons une gamme de prestations personnalisées 
pour atteindre vos objectifs qualité de service et de valorisation 
de vos actifs, au même niveau que dans votre patrimoine en pleine 
propriété, tout en maintenant des relations harmonieuses avec les 
copropriétaires et locataires.

Name: Reqpero Sagl
Description:
Reqpero Sagl è un'azienda specializzata nel risanamento, nella ristrutturazione, nel recupero post allagamento e nella bonifica di edifici e strutture danneggiati da eventi e calamità naturali, incendi o malfunzionamenti delle infrastrutture.

La nostra missione è fornire un servizio completo e professionale, che consenta ai nostri clienti di ripristinare il proprio patrimonio in tempi brevi e con il minimo disagio.
Vogliamo essere il punto di riferimento per le persone e per le aziende che hanno subito un danno. Ci impegniamo a fornire un servizio completo “chiavi in mano”, in modo tempestivo, efficace e professionale, garantendo un risultato ottimale. 

Vantiamo di un team composto da professionisti altamente qualificati, in grado di intervenire in qualsiasi situazione, anche le più complesse. Siamo sempre aggiornati sulle ultime tecniche e tecnologie, per garantire le migliori soluzioni, più innovative.

Servizi Offerti:
-	Intervento rapido post incendio e allagamento
-	Ricerca delle perdite e lavori di idraulica
-	Fornitura e installazione di serramenti interni/esterni
-	Gestione della mobilia e sgomberi
-	Sanificazione e pulizia degli ambienti
-	Riparazione di tetti e lettoneria
-	Pittura, cartongesso e muratura
-	Deposito sicuro dei materiali durante i lavori
-	Reperibilità h24, 7 giorni su 7
-	Servizio lavanderia 

I nostri punti di forza:

-	Tempestività ed efficacia
-	Qualità impeccabile del lavoro svolto
-	Consulenza e professionalità grazie ad un team altamente qualificato.
-	Responsabilità e affidabilità

Ci proponiamo come vostro unico interlocutore per velocizzare le pratiche e contenere i costi, con soluzioni su misura ed economicamente vantaggiose. 

Collaboriamo strettamente con le Compagnie Assicurative per garantire una gestione efficiente e risolutiva.

Per maggiori informazioni:
info@reqpero.ch
T. +41 210 40 94

Name: HopeBUILDERS Home Repair, Inc.
Description:
HopeBUILDERS Home Repair is a 501c3 nonprofit that exists to help older adults, veterans, and people with disabilities in the Greater KC metro area. We do this by providing accessibility modifications like ramps, door widenings, bathroom modifications and other home repairs. Our goal through these projects is to help homeowners age in place in safe, accessible, and healthy homes. 

To request assistance, donate or learn more about volunteering, visit www.hopebuilders-kc.org.

Name: Howarth Housing Group
Description:
By working closely with Local Authorities we are able to provide a service not previously seen in the Manchester region, by placing clients in self-contained properties, having undergone thorough risk management and safeguarding procedures, we allow those placed with us to experience a sense of normality in their time of need.

It is our view that the personal approach is the best way to ensure a high success rate. Moving clients into permanent residences by allowing them the opportunity to reacquaint themselves with domestic life again, a factor that when ignored contributes strongly to the failure of permanent placements following long periods of homelessness.

Name: Illinois Manufactured Housing Association
Description:
The Illinois Manufactured Housing Association (IMHA) serves as the voice of the manufactured housing industry in Illinois. 

For over 65 years, IMHA has represented the industry before the Illinois General Assembly, county zoning boards, communities, and governing officials at the city, county, state, and federal levels. 

IMHA members represent all aspects of the manufactured housing industry, which means IMHA works to promote the industry as a whole. IMHA members are retailers, manufactured housing community owners and managers, suppliers, manufacturers, financial institutions, service companies, transporters, land developers, real estate companies, attorneys and all the various entities that make up the manufactured housing industry in Illinois.

A vital function of the Association is to promote and protect the manufactured housing industry through legislative and lobbying activities. 

Along with an aggressive public relations program, sharing state and national industry information and continuing education programs, we strive to serve our members and represent a powerful and united front for the manufactured housing industry.

Name: RAPeL ASBL
Description:
Le RAPeL, fédération des Associations de Promotion du Logement,
représente actuellement 32 APL sur le territoire wallon.

Une APL s’adresse principalement aux ménages en état de précarité et agit pour l’intégration sociale par l’habitat de diverses manières. Outre la mise à disposition d’un habitat décent, une APL procure un accompagnement social gratuit sur le plan administratif, juridique et technique aux locataires mais également aux propriétaires qui le souhaitent. Elle forme et informe directement ces personnes pour qu’elles accèdent et se maintiennent dans leur habitat. Elle soutient des projets collectifs novateurs. Elle porte des initiatives ancrées localement et répond aux besoins du terrain avec des moyens à la fois publics et privés. Elle travaille en réseau de manière à unir ses forces avec celles de ses partenaires.

Name: Alchimia Srls
Description:
𝗟𝗮 𝗺𝗶𝗮 𝗲𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗲: 𝗱𝗮 𝗰𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮 𝗮 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗻𝗲𝗹 𝘀𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲 𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗱'𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶. Il mio viaggio nel mondo del lavoro è iniziato nel 2006 nella ditta di famiglia e mi ha portato a fondare la mia società nel 2021. Dopo aver aperto la mia partita IVA nel 2008 e aver collaborato con l'azienda di mio padre per un decennio, ho sentito l'esigenza di crescere e specializzarmi.

Nel 2018, grazie all'associazione Assoposa, ho potuto ampliare le mie competenze come piastrellista, ottenendo certificazioni importanti e conoscendo molti colleghi da tutta Italia. Questa esperienza mi ha spinto a trasformare la mia partita IVA in una società, allargando il nostro team e la gamma di servizi offerti.

Oggi, il nostro team è specializzato in:

→ Posa di pavimenti e rivestimenti in gres, parquet e resina.
→ Installazione di carta da parati.
→ Progettazione e costruzione di lavabi, top cucina e molto altro.

Collaboriamo con architetti e showroom per garantire soluzioni estetiche e funzionali che soddisfino al meglio le esigenze dei nostri clienti. La nostra passione per il design e l'attenzione ai dettagli ci guidano quotidianamente nella ricerca di nuove soluzioni innovative e di alta qualità.

Name: The Shelter Initiative CT
Description:
At The Shelter Initiative (TSI), we are dedicated to transforming lives through innovative housing solutions. Our mission is to provide safe, stable, and sustainable pathways to housing for individuals facing homelessness and housing insecurity.

We believe that shelter is more than just a roof over one’s head—it’s the foundation for rebuilding lives. Through a strategic blend of technology, community partnerships, and compassionate support, we help individuals transition from crisis to stability, offering both short-term and long-term housing solutions.

At TSI, we are redefining the future of housing assistance by leveraging AI-powered support, data-driven solutions, and human connection to create a lasting impact. Whether you’re looking for resources, partnerships, or ways to support our mission, join us as we work to ensure everyone has a place to call home.

 Connect with us to learn more and be part of the change.

Name: Fab Solution
Description:
Benvenuti nella pagina di Fab Solution.
Fab Solution opera nel settore delle costruzioni edili ed adotta uno stile “agile” nella gestione ed esecuzione delle commesse, ispirandosi e applicando le procedure inerenti alle normative UNI 11648 e UNI EN ISO 21500. 
Queste scelte hanno delineato come strategia organizzativa   una continua evoluzione e miglioramento nei processi di: pianificazione, esecuzione e controllo, portando dei vantaggi tangibili a tutti gli attori della commessa.
L’importanza della precisione tecnica, il rispetto dell’ambiente e l’attuazione delle innovazioni, ci permettono di aggiungere valore a ciò che costruiamo e mantenerlo per il futuro, realizzando così prodotti “su misura”.
Oltre alla costruzione di edifici civili, eseguiamo interventi di manutenzione e ristrutturazione, offrendo anche il servizio di “chiavi in mano”, tutto questo grazie alle competenze dei nostri collaboratori e tecnici.

Description:
Das Lebensgemeinschaftsprojekt “Pauscha” widmet sich der Öffnung eines inklusiven und altersgemischten Lebensraums auf dem Land mit Wohnraum für etwa 80 Personen. Struktureller Wandel im ländlichen Raum darf hier ganzheitlich ge- und erlebt werden:

Neben Wohnraum entstehen Arbeitsplätze, werden soziokulturelle Bildungsräume geschaffen sowie nachhaltige Landwirtschaft und Naturschutz betrieben.

Als Verbindungsglied dieser Bereiche und wertvolles Tool der Vernetzung untereinander aber vor allem mit der örtlichen Gemeinde ist Kunst und Kultur zentrales Element unseres Lebensmodells.

Es soll ein Ort entstehen, mit dem Ziel, Menschen zusammenzubringen und zu verbinden. Ein Ort, welcher Kreativität, Neugierde, Abenteuerlust und Offenheit entfacht. Der dazu führt, dass wir uns auf verschiedensten Ebenen weiterentwickeln und neue Wege gehen.

Name: Spoke Housing Solutions
Description:
At Spoke Housing Solutions, our passion is to help families and housing providers overcome common challenges using proven solutions and a straightforward design that takes affordable housing to the next level.

Our mission is to seamlessly match families of low and moderate resources with housing providers through intuitive, user friendly systems that work to achieve zero vacancy in local communities. To reach our mission, we focus on four guiding principles. 

Core Values
As the demand for affordable housing increases, the process of finding, applying, and managing inclusionary housing has become more intricate within each municipality. This ultimately leads to headaches for everyone involved. We want to be part of the larger solution by matching housing provides with those in need  in a rapid and efficient manner.

Customers
Understanding the needs of customers and property managers alike allows
us to provide great service behind the scenes. Every decision we make is based on the impact it will have on the customers we serve.

Consistency
A focus on logic, accuracy, and fairness across the board is critical to our team. This means demonstrating a high level of integrity, honesty, loyalty and respect in all situations with all people.

Compassion
We strive for a lasting and positive impact on the communities we serve by putting the housing needs of others first and in turn giving hope to those who need it most.

Communication
We pride ourselves in listening to customers’ needs and collaborating with transparency on a common goal.

Name: Housing Opinion
Description:
Innovative Housing Research

We help policy makers, housing professionals and practitioners identify and solve housing sector challenges through housing research.

Our Research Areas

We conduct housing studies across the entire housing system including the private rented sector (PRS), social housing sector (SHS), build to rent sector (BTR) and purpose built student accommodation (PBSA). 

Our Credentials

Our researchers and research associates are experts in their fields. They combine decades of property industry experience with advanced academic qualifications and rich mixed methods research experience.

Our Services

Using primary and secondary research, we  can create and disseminate in depth research studies including evidence reviews, value analysis, case studies, market insights, policy reviews, benchmarking, and more.

Name: Gunnison Valley Regional Housing Authority
Description:
Our vision is to support the quality of life and economic vitality of the unique communities in the Gunnison Valley by increasing housing choices and opportunities for local residents.

Each community in the valley has unique characteristics, and will bring different assets and priorities to their affordable housing work. At the same time, our local economy and housing challenges are regional in nature, and sometimes require regional and collaborative responses.

A holistic approach to affordability is needed – we acknowledge that physical deed restricted homes are the most tangible element of housing affordability, but energy efficiency, transportation, healthcare, childcare, and local wages are all ingredients in a sustainable local cost of living. Programs such as down payment assistance, homebuyer education, and home renovation also help to ensure successful outcomes. A holistic approach to housing also recognizes the importance of housing choices in close proximity to jobs, schools, and other services.

The strength of our local economy is closely linked with the strength of our housing market; the housing authority’s role is to create more housing choices for local employees and residents, not to compete with private sector endeavors or undertake work that might oversupply housing for a specific demographic.

Through this journey of homebuilding, we’ve also come to learn that the security of having a safe space to call home is one that should be made genuinely affordable to all. That is why we have supported Community Partners for Affordable Housing (CPAH) for the last decade, financially and through pro bono architectural services. CPAH is a HUD-certified affordable housing nonprofit organization that has a thriving Community Land Trust (CPAH CLT). Historically, CPAH CLT has primarily been working in Highland Park, Evanston and Lake Forest, all communities that have dedicated funds for affordable housing.

Name: Assuredhubs
Description: Finding reliable and safe rental accommodations is a big challenge for international students, immigrants, and remote renters. These groups often struggle to check if a rental property is legitimate, safe, and clean from afar, which can lead to issues like fraud, poor living conditions, and misleading listings. It's crucial for renters to have safe and secure living spaces, especially if they are new to a country or city. The rental market can have scams and false listings, so having a trustworthy viewing service like AssuredHubs helps build confidence. This service reduces the stress of moving to a new place by providing verified information about potential rentals, allowing renters to make informed decisions and feel more secure. Ensuring that rentals meet expectations in safety, cleanliness, and amenities greatly improves renters' quality of life and overall experience. AssuredHubs saves renters time and resources by conducting thorough property checks and providing transparent feedback, so they don't have to do it themselves from a distance. By solving these problems, AssuredHubs aims to make the rental market more transparent, trustworthy, and efficient for international students, immigrants, and remote renters, enhancing their relocation experience.

We provide integrated solutions & ecosystems connected with green & sustainable housing like green energy, pure food, pure drinking water, health, sports and recreational facilities for residents at very affordable prices. 
We see the housing sector as the best possible solution to the environmental and socio-economic problems of Pakistan and its citizens as we should strengthen our reliance upon and affiliation with Mother Nature and its gifts through sustainable and green housing solutions. 
Our philosophy revolves around collaboration, integration, synergy and win-win strategies. We strictly adhere to achieving SDGs through ESG at the local level.
We are going to launch the first green housing project in the South Punjab region of Pakistan based on features like green energy, biogas, organic farming combined with digital facilitation. 
We are going to build 1000 green and affordable houses (3 & 5 Marla) for the middle class groups in divisional headquarters of South & Central Punjab. (Bahawalpur, Multan, Faisalabad, Sahiwal, etc) in next three years, Insha Allah. 
We shall introduce & promote the concept of Zero-Energy/Less-Energy Dependent Houses in Pakistan & South Asia through this project.
All amenities & services will be integrated into a digital platform for real-time service to & surveillance by residents, introducing a digital dashboard for its residents so that they can become more socially connected and responsible citizens. This digital dashboard will then integrate into other national & international services platforms like citizen portal etc.

Name: Housing Authority of the County of Dauphin
Description:
The Mission of the Housing Authority of the County of Dauphin is to provide eligible families with safe, decent, and affordable housing opportunities as they strive to achieve self-sufficiency and improve the quality of their lives. Furthermore, the Housing Authority will endeavor to provide accessible facilities to persons with disabilities. The Housing Authority is committed to operating in an efficient, ethical, and professional manner as well as creating and maintaining partnerships with its clients and appropriate community agencies.

The Housing Authority has come a long way since its creation in 1959. At its core, the Housing Authority’s mission has always been to provide affordable housing to lower income persons. Initially, housing assistance was provided exclusively through the Public Housing Program. Lang Manor was the first Public Housing development opened in 1963, followed by the construction of 15 other Public Housing buildings and developments through 1986. There are now a total of 725 units. 

In addition to the Public Housing Program, the Housing Authority implemented the Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) Rental Assistance Program in the mid 1970s. Over time, the Authority gradually increased the size of the HCV Program. Today, the Authority is authorized  to assist more than 1,072 families.

Description:

We help individuals who may not qualify for traditional housing options, including seniors on fixed income, people in recovery, returning citizens, and anyone rebuilding their life.
Our programs offer more than just a room. We provide fully furnished community living with all utilities included, plus real support to help residents stay stable and reach their goals.

What We Offer:
Furnished rooms in safe residential neighborhoods
All bills included (utilities, internet, household basics)
Care coordination and personalized support plans
Life skills training (budgeting, cooking, time management)
Employment support (resume help, interview coaching, job search)
Connection to community resources and healthcare
A sober, respectful community environment

Our Programs:
Senior Program (55+) in downtown Hampton
General Supportive Housing for people on fixed incomes or facing housing instability
A Brighter Way: specialized reentry program with mentorship, family reunification support, and wraparound services for returning citizens

We believe everyone deserves stable housing and a supportive community. We work with people on a case-by-case basis and focus on long-term stability, not just placement.

Follow us for housing resources, success stories, and information about our programs.

Dr. Allen S. Turner and his GLOM team developed a unique evidence-based approach to provide support in reconnecting thousands of previously incarcerated individuals back to their communities as value adds for themselves and their families.

As a Solution to Community Issues, Dr. Turner and GLOM saw the rising numbers of our unhoused brothers and sisters across the Bay Area as well in Northern and Central California. Name: Bright Spot Sober Living Inc
Description:
Bright Spot Sober Living provides transitional housing for women in recovery from Substance Use Disorder.  We start by providing safe homes with accountability and structure; a safe place to land after treatment or detox. We then provide resources for our residents to reintegrate into society, and teach life skills they may not have previously had access to. 

Our residents are required to attend meetings, complete a weekly chore, be home by curfew, and follow all life skills. Each house has a live-in House Manager that guides our residents and holds them accountable to following the rules. They hold a house meeting once a week and discuss their progress, the meetings they went to that week, and hold them accountable to obtaining employment and working with a sponsor or mentor.

We have a Case Management program, in which we assist our residents in areas of life that may feel overwhelming. We guide them and provide resources in the following areas:
-Obtaining affordable health insurance
-Scheduling doctor, therapist, and psychiatrist appointments
-Receiving dental work
-Creating a resume
-Opening a bank account
-We provide them with a bus pass or bicycle if they do not have means of transportation
-Getting their drivers license
-Grocery shopping and cooking
-Budgeting and saving
-Time management and prioritizing

Once we narrow down the areas in which each resident need help in, we create a plan of action along with goals for that residents, and help them navigate the waters.

Name: Widow's Nest
Description:
Widow's Nest supports widows and widowers through charitable housing, emotional and spiritual support for those in need due to the death of their spouse.

More than just a home.

Widow's Nest is more than a house for a widow or widower. It is community. Monthly activities will be offered to provide companionship and fun. A full-time Chaplain is on staff for prayer and group Bible studies. There will be opportunities to serve other local nonprofits. Once approved, the widows or widowers will be not only tenants, but family.

What support does a widow or widower need?

Everyone grieves differently. The loss of a loved one is not something to get over, but a transition to walk through. Widow's Nest believes the pain of losing a loved one should not be compounded by financial concerns. We also believe that supporting someone after a loss includes caring for emotional and spiritual aspects also. By minimizing financial hardship, a widow or widower can focus on the emotional healing and sometimes spiritual revival. Our goal is to assist in all of these areas.

“Pure and undefiled religion before God and the Father is this: to visit orphans and widows in their trouble." James 1:27 NKJV

Description:
Opportunities for Hope is a private, non-profit organization providing shelter, nutritional assistance, substance abuse, and domestic violence services and other related programs to homeless persons, the unemployed, families, women, children, veterans, and the disable, while also emphasizing the dignity of each individual. This means that every person we serve is created equal and should be treated that way - we emphasize the dignity of the individual, and
through our programs encourage and assist each client to become self-sufficient.

A related mission is to educate the public concerning the problem of homelessness and further to advocate possible solutions as well as those related problems such as domestic violence, substance abuse and nutritional assistance.

Opportunities for Hope is working on permanent solutions to homelessness by providing a progression of emergency shelter and support when needed, transitional and permanent housing when possible and practical; and individual support and guidance to encourage and assist our clients in becoming self-sufficient and hopefully if the person has the ability to
become gainfully employed and become an active participant of the community.
Finding more permanent solutions to social ills requires us to work with other community providers, public agencies, individuals, and private business so we can offer a comprehensive set of services aimed at getting people off the street where they can be safe and then we work closely with them and service providers to help them become self-sufficient.
